name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Biden and Pelosi's Partisan Power Grab
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, There are three words to describe President Joe Biden's and Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s 2021 agenda: partisan power grab.
No images? [Click here](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-e-fjyyhjk-idtjvlhlh-h/) Peter,There are three words to describe President Joe Biden's and Speaker Nancy Pelosi's 2021 agenda: **partisan power grab.** Despite Biden's public claims that he seeks unity and bipartisanship, we have seen a classic bait-and-switch, delivering ineffective, wasteful, and partisan results. Despite the problems facing our families, communities, and nation, Biden and Pelosi are teaming up to take control of Washington.**Biden and Pelosi think they can get away with it. But we can 't let them. **We have to share with the American people just how disastrous their radical agenda is. That's why [**I wrote an op-ed in the Washington Examiner**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fjyyhjk-idtjvlhlh-r/) calling attention to their attempts to rig the process in their favor, including:
* H.R. 1, Democrats federal takeover of our elections
* An effort to Unseat, Pelosi's attempt to overturn the will of the voters in IA-02
* D.C. Statehood, adding two guaranteed Democrats to the United States Senate
* Court Packing, expanding the U.S. Supreme Court to add liberal activists to the bench

The current agenda in Washington is the wrong agenda for America. We must continue to sound the alarm and create national awareness. I will continue exposing their partisan power grabs and work to advance policies that support families and workers.Please read [my full Op-Ed in the Washington Examiner](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fjyyhjk-idtjvlhlh-y/) and share it on social media or [forward it to a friend](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-fjyyhjk-l-k).Bryan
\--
**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Read The Full Op-Ed](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fjyyhjk-idtjvlhlh-j/) [Forward to a Friend](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-fjyyhjk-l-u) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fjyyhjk-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fjyyhjk-idtjvlhlh-i/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-fjyyhjk-idtjvlhlh-d/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-fjyyhjk-l-x) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

American Patriot,
**We’re tackling the radical Left head on.**

The Mississippi Republican Party has been working tirelessly to **EXPOSE** the lies of the Biden Administration, **HIGHLIGHT** the dangers of Far Left policies, and **PUSH BACK** against the Liberal narrative created and spread by the mainstream media.

Now, we’re counting on **LOYAL** supporters like _you_ to ensure we do not get out-fundraised by the Left and Democrat political elites in Washington.

**_Will YOU join us?_**
[**Donate _HERE_ to _Keep MS RED!_**](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=8dc801ae77b24caf92bc374dab9341ab&_e=kg1w4AGMpeQk151YD3NTlnoENsj0ulvQR33Q0biyq9tWxCHDTdtEguty8UnF8KsqstqGtHJnGkfwl7XFPf8OEhTFbw0htsecmdwYZ9ASSR5KrCjT-e4icGSKkBk_HkPWdlYg8nrMA980DYBTKI5NjdSc2U6XNoMxkxvqYDMegJ3vRDPQ8zorcY0C0cBLsX7_8fQGWRXeojCLRLDo25YLNesaG2Dj980sElC_jLpXGBmPDZ5OoeBRhz7GVKipc9wXNNY241xm4Kexb3TM5img-6yV_PCPJeJISQrDA227apHCb3gq7U1pq4n1Ab13ESTzqQ-aLJBFUpSj_FpNGdc-HNU6uFeZF6OXLS4n8SvpQPkbLvjTXeBD7UyHwcZSYMlNRceSiZobWdH8ot6Y3ZAQfQ%3D%3D)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Another Washington Post hit piece
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57442917:6tmg3LlZN:m:1:3103520637:B2A87544E9C712270DDBDADDB4868A70:r "Headline") Peter, I'm now a 41-year-old member of the United States Senate, a father, husband, Christian, and former clerk for the Chief Justice of the United States Supreme Court, and former Attorney General for my state. None of that seems to matter to the left. Just the other day, _The Washington Post_ published a profile story on me, and they thought it was more important to find out why someone who attended Middle School with me is disappointed that we have divergent political views and then accuse my hometown of being inherently racist. This is how Conservatives are treated in this nation when they stand up for their beliefs. They will look for any way to hurt us. They even have someone suggesting I should wear an "S" on my shirt for "sedition." **[If the Swamp is willing to go this far to destroy me, it is clear they are only just getting started. That is why I am writing today asking for your help.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57442917:6tmg3LlZN:m:1:3103520637:B2A87544E9C712270DDBDADDB4868A70:r "If the Swamp is willing to go this far to destroy me, it
is clear they are only just getting started. That is why I am writing today asking for your help.")** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57442917:6tmg3LlZN:m:1:3103520637:B2A87544E9C712270DDBDADDB4868A70:r "Childhood home")I knew that Big Tech would try to make me pay when I started standing up to them, but I never expected Jeff Bezos to go this far. I'm not joking - **_The Washington Post_ tracked down a person I worked with when I was 12 years old** to see what they thought of my objection. They interviewed friends of mine from high school; they **_even hid behind bushes to take a picture of my childhood home and looked into the books I read as a child._** **[Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $1200, even just $45 will let Big Tech and the Media know that their scare tactics won't work on American Conservatives.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57442918:6tmg3LlZN:m:1:3103520637:B2A87544E9C712270DDBDADDB4868A70:r "Your donation of $1,000, $500, $250, $1200, even just $45 will
let Big Tech and the Media know that their scare tactics won’t work on American Conservatives.")** **They just want to punish me for standing up for YOU and formally objecting to the 2020 election results. It isn 't going to work, and it won't stop me from keeping up my fight against Big Tech.** I did not come to Washington to win a popularity contest with the establishment. It is my job to represent the people of Missouri, and I knew that the Swamp would try to make me pay. They have already tried to cancel me. Antifa showed up at my home here while my wife and 4-month-old daughter were home. Now, the radical left is looking into my actions when I was a child to intimidate me. Still, they never seem to care when we have Members of Congress siding with known terrorists in the Middle East instead of our best ally, Israel. While they have the wrong priorities, their tactics won't work on me - but it helps to know who is still standing with me. **[Will you please make your most generous contribution of $50 or more, so I have what I need to keep going? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly appreciated.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57442919:6tmg3LlZN:m:1:3103520637:B2A87544E9C712270DDBDADDB4868A70:r "Will you please make your most
generous contribution of $50 or more, so I have what I need to keep going? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly
appreciated.")** The last time I wrote you, I told you that it was a question of "when" the Swamp would come after me. _I was right, and we can now all see how far they are willing to go._ **[I'm going to fight back. Are you with me?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57442918:6tmg3LlZN:m:1:3103520637:B2A87544E9C712270DDBDADDB4868A70:r "I’m going to fight back. Are you with me?")** For America,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57442917:6tmg3LlZN:m:1:3103520637:B2A87544E9C712270DDBDADDB4868A70:r "Josh Hawley")
Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri P.S. Bezos and _The Washington Post_ aren't done with me. I need to be ready the next time they interview someone I shared fingerpaints with when I was five years old. **[I need your help to fend off their ridiculous smears. Please donate today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57442917:6tmg3LlZN:m:1:3103520637:B2A87544E9C712270DDBDADDB4868A70:r "I need your help to fend off their ridiculous smears. Please
donate today.")** | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57442917:6tmg3LlZN:m:1:3103520637:B2A87544E9C712270DDBDADDB4868A70:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: because it’s critical to Tennessee’s future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Peter,
We are reminded almost daily of the dangers of keeping Bill Lee in power. The TNDP is committed to defeating him in 2022 because it’s critical to Tennessee’s future, and we need your help. From his unconstitutional political court and attack on workers rights, to his relentless dedication to refusing federal aid for those suffering at the hands of this pandemic – the fact remains, Bill Lee has to go.
As part of our Build Back Blue program, our digital ads and coordinated voter registration efforts have never been more important. This is how we will turn Tennessee blue in 2022, but we need more resources to continue with our momentum. We need your support. Will you help us? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
P.S. Please, only donate if you can afford to. The impacts of this pandemic are real, and we completely understand if times are tough right now.

name: Brittni McGuire
subject: The Republicans are coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Friend,
In a red state like ours, it can be hard to see the progress that West Virginia Democrats are working towards. The WVDP has been quietly doing our work in the background and we are starting to see the fruits of our labor – but it’s still too early to start counting our blessings.
We've set big goals going into 2022 and those include holding at least 55 voter registration drives to register 10,000 new or purged Demcratic voters, growing our volunteer list by 100% and organizing by county, and holding a series of trainings for activists and candidates.
At our current pace we are confident we’ll have higher voter turnout and more democratic victories in our next election – but that’s only if we can keep raising the necessary resources. The Republicans are coming. They are doing everything they can to destroy our progress and we cannot let them. Will you make a donation today, and help us have the resources we need to keep fighting? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
Thank you!
Brittni McGuire, Communications Director, WVDP

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Washington Post: Kick MTG out of Congress!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marjorie
body:
Peter -- Never before has a Republican been under attack like
me since the Democrats tried to impeach and remove President
Trump from office.
I stood up for President Trump, I stand for
America First, I filed Articles of Impeachment against Joe Biden,
I introduced legislation to FIRE Fauci, and I speak the truth.
And now, Washington Post, Nancy Pelosi, AOC,
Maxine Waters. . .they're all scheming behind the scenes to EXPEL
me from Congress.

STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25
Because I believe in People over Politicians,
the Democrats have made me enemy #1 and they're using
unprecedented attacks to shut me down.
But I won't be silenced! Will you help fight
back with a generous donation of $25 right away?
Democrats removed from Committee assignments
and now want me expelled. Fake News is smearing me. And Big Tech
wants to censor me.
I need all the support I can get so I can
defend myself in the public sphere.
I want to raise $10,000 by midnight tonight
to my "People Over Politicians" fund.
I know it's ambitious, but the truth is
without the funds, I cannot send out emails, texts, mail pieces,
videos, or buy crucial radio and TV airtime to defend myself.
Big Tech isn't allowing me to sponsor ads on
their platforms.
So your donation of $25 is more critical
than ever. Can I count on your support right away?

STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25
I must be able to defend myself against these
nasty smear tactics and show that you and I and the America First
agenda are not going anywhere!
More importantly I need you, the People, to
have my back!
Make no mistake, the Radical Left, led by AOC
and the Jihad Squad, are trying to remove me from office for
defending President Trump. And as President Trump's biggest
supporter, I've become Enemy #1.
But in reality, they're not after me. They're
after you. I'm just in their way.
I must fight back. I must have the resources
to defend myself in the public sphere.
Will you stand with me? Chip in $25 or
more right away.
STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25
As a Christian, a wife, a mother of three,
and a small business owner, I ran for Congress to support
President Trump and his America First policies.
And now I'm under constant assault from the
most radical socialists in Washington, D.C.
In fact, on top of Democrats trying to remove
me from office, the Fake News writes nonstop smear pieces, and
the Silicon Valley Cartel is always trying to shut me down.
But I will not be intimidated or silenced
because I have the support of you, the people!
If you stand with me, please, chip in with
whatever you can afford.
Every bit helps me fight back through email,
text messages, phone calls and even social media (when I'm not
censored!).
Even if it's just $10 or $15, every dollar
goes a long way.
Thanks so much. I will keep you updated.
-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

Paid for by Marjorie
Taylor Greene's People Over Politicians Committee - a joint
fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Greene for
Congress and Save America Stop Socialism PAC. Marjorie Taylor
Greene's People Over Politicians Committee PO Box 1575, Roswell,
Georgia 30077

clean_body: | | | | | | | = | | | Friend — Thanks to this grassroots movement, we won in 2020 and kept Wisconsin moving forward – but it was a lot closer than we ever would have liked. | = That's way too close, and we simply can't let it happen again if we want to keep moving Wisconsin forward – = Right now, national Republican dark money groups are on the attack in Wisconsin and spending millions on TV and digital ads to spread lies and misinformation in our district. But we're not about to back down. We're setting a $10,000 end-of-month goal to stay on track to win in 2022. We can't get complacent or back down for a minute. = | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | | | = = | = = | | | = = | = = | | | | Thanks for stepping up when we need you most. For Wisconsin, Team Kind | | | | | | = = | | | To learn more about Ron Kind and moving Wisconsin forward visit . Emails are the best way to stay updated on our campaign but if you wish .

name: Team Malcolm
subject: asking for your support today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friend,
Supporters like you are the key to our strategy to win this race. That’s because donations from real working people like you are what fund our work to send a working person to the U.S. Senate.
When you chip in to our campaign, your dollars go right to work helping us build a big coalition of support behind our progressive movement for healthcare, green union jobs, climate action, voting rights, and so much more.
They pay for staff to plan our path to victory, videos to share how growing up in the North Philly projects motivated Malcolm into becoming an activist for his community, and events to connect with folks in communities across all of Pennsylvania's 67 counties.
And the early stages of this race are all about building lasting momentum — that means every dollar from every donor makes a big difference, especially right now.
[So we have to ask: Could you pitch in a few bucks to our campaign to elect Malcolm today? We need your support to make sure Pennsylvania’s next Senator is someone who will always go to bat for working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29471190/286513538/-347207331?refcode2=b9d0d2c7-84b9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210520-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWQwZDJjNy04NGI5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=svVraMyq7ZarlqbIfI8Eycs2GqwCZqdlRoYn87JA-5M=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29471191/286513539/-347207331?refcode2=b9d0d2c7-84b9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210520-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWQwZDJjNy04NGI5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=svVraMyq7ZarlqbIfI8Eycs2GqwCZqdlRoYn87JA-5M=)**
Thanks,
Team Malcolm

name: Ali S. Zaidi
subject: Fwd: “I Like Mike” special edition sticker just for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
| Hey friend, Over the past week, I’ve been meeting with our team to make some important financial decisions about the weeks and months ahead. As the legislative session ends and we enter the campaign season, here's what we need to do to take the fight to Dan Patrick early:
* Build a winning campaign team with some of the best talent in the nation and every part of the state

* Make early investments to make sure Texans know how Dan Patrick failed them this legislative session

* Campaign online to attract more supporters and expand our grassroots network

We want to hit the ground running if Mike decides to throw his hat in the ring. So we cannot wait for the election to roll around to start whipping up votes. Before we make those financial commitments, we need to lay the groundwork for a true grassroots movement from the ground up. **[Recurring donors like you allow Mike to get out there and fight for our Texas values. And if we can count on you to fuel this campaign, we want to send you this free sticker to show you’re on Team Collier.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc-email-may2021-recurringsticker?recurring=true&amount=5&refcode=em210520-recurringstickerbump)** To be frank, unlike Dan Patrick, we can’t count on hundreds of thousands of dollars being parachuted in from lobbyists and corporations. Instead, we rely on small donors like you chipping in when they can and we're proud of it. Thanks for being in our corner, Ali Zaidi
Deputy Campaign Manager
Mike Collier for Texas _\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Mike Collier for Lt. Gov._
_Date: Tues, May 18, 2021
Subject: “I Like Mike” special edition sticker just for you_ Hello folks, From day one, grassroots supporters like you have been the foundation of our people-powered movement, and Mike is so grateful to have you on board. The next few months will likely determine whether Mike has the resources and backing to take the fight to Dan Patrick. In the months ahead, we’ll be expecting a summer slowdown in fundraising as the legislative session ends. Like Mike says, in order to hold ‘em accountable, we have to beat ‘em. By making a monthly contribution, you are building up our team for long-term success and paving the way for Mike’s path to victory. **[Help sustain our movement by a country mile. name: Mark McCloskey
subject: POLL: Is BLM a mob?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri
body:
When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that the freedoms we take for granted are worth ... When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5e82a2c27b2d4f44acc211854794dd68&_e=-VAwT1zTLsERAnqzq_QFdgQYRd_nWETbd17pwg6IqIl3_qODH6AjKuKnlPb0L2K4OjlcEzazdJ4guDkYGP3oECtrswTkxI_K7wS6UnLmairyjKKk2xs-aXxFc66yHyvk7pjdtq10WHSiJtZnsuXvTPCWm-W1GNN2h0-SRW-SMscYpa8an-ayRLZOMYth7CgifA9vY4_EY7rwFEJpU3Jx75Z7zN-5nBmBGGTG5Kg4Zz-BiLh5CycIVLA2B5PAk1EbuFyJ2z6xOuWZiSB8D_9GexnNdn5nAkCbO_ZucscMs1IEAszj561hC22qccRJ4BMxxJSXRxOrpoE_3a8ymWZylaiSTwnZGCssOAA1OIbiJimCLBfK_NwcpSoE5RfqZ4a5n2qaE24_lc8UWvQg7hdjyFOJwjsFy9QSPUbA_al6CP1TGoC3wZvXMKujOpIqXmLRuviCjD10oFsjueuY4_wM02kebDXW7_sgvG3ZRQWXyofCVc6ZvSq-RH8av-wCeemJUkpvCoIoq6pRsTTyWx78xv7bbUC3UY2LFyfrFczn91l9trHwra-vad7XCyeNsA2ZrDeJiZEesIAnUYRvBq6KhyaaxzfMwgv9hLP5VebNXV7W_j14ghnGacv_ic3dKoO6UML7bSp6s8_L23vOVRE_8miloid_9eaC1ZNocgfivug%3D)
---

Fellow American,

During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past.

When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath.

**My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground. And the scariest part of _all?_ What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today.**

**That’s why I have decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate.**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5e82a2c27b2d4f44acc211854794dd68&_e=-VAwT1zTLsERAnqzq_QFdgQYRd_nWETbd17pwg6IqIl3_qODH6AjKuKnlPb0L2K4OjlcEzazdJ4guDkYGP3oECtrswTkxI_K7wS6UnLmairyjKKk2xs-aXxFc66yHyvk7pjdtq10WHSiJtZnsuXvTPCWm-W1GNN2h0-SRW-SMscYpa8an-ayRLZOMYth7CgifA9vY4_EY7rwFEJpU3Jx75Z7zN-5nBmBGGTG5Kg4Zz-BiLh5CycIVLA2B5PAk1EbuFyJ2z6xOuWZiSB8D_9GexnNdn5nAkCbO_ZucscMs1IEAszj561hC22qccRJ4BMxxJSXRxOrpoE_3a8ymWZylaiSTwnZGCssOAA1OIbiJimCLBfK_NwcpSoE5RfqZ4a5n2qaE24_lc8UWvQg7hdjyFOJwjsFy9QSPUbA_al6CP1TGoC3wZvXMKujOpIqXmLRu25817rorYrh7CvYZjte0ZMXkoK0VP4swO5zxyh8vGWY_hbDZPzCHGoYnNHHTLEEeecnu_aznbRLDibsbh1fjqx9YUFpymECCP7qmEigY5NCqHZ9n-oky4oFcd4M2Jte5BGpok_jDjKD0ZX5jsIzh7wnec0B1Je6LU67O7IJIMYEHr_mJ7IK3fOpxAhAkqyh_7HSuKGO8KQv_7TFD_gIWjhe1Sp2s39J197AIGVDoro%3D)
[ WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO
STAND WITH ME AGAINST THE MOB »](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5e82a2c27b2d4f44acc211854794dd68&_e=-VAwT1zTLsERAnqzq_QFdgQYRd_nWETbd17pwg6IqIl3_qODH6AjKuKnlPb0L2K4OjlcEzazdJ4guDkYGP3oECtrswTkxI_K7wS6UnLmairyjKKk2xs-aXxFc66yHyvk7pjdtq10WHSiJtZnsuXvTPCWm-W1GNN2h0-SRW-SMscYpa8an-ayRLZOMYth7CgifA9vY4_EY7rwFEJpU3Jx75Z7zN-5nBmBGGTG5Kg4Zz-BiLh5CycIVLA2B5PAk1EbuFyJ2z6xOuWZiSB8D_9GexnNdn5nAkCbO_ZucscMs1IEAszj561hC22qccRJ4BMxxJSXRxOrpoE_3a8ymWZylaiSTwnZGCssOAA1OIbiJimCLBfK_NwcpSoE5RfqZ4a5n2qaE24_lc8UWvQg7hdjyFOJwjsFy9QSPUbA_al6CP1TGoC3wZvXMKujOpIqXmLREFvP3xCz2774dn2bpWvpbrY3ed1tilZ0OlWz53fqltyKIHPK2YOptt4Tko5PKqyVQAw_5qrEKDopSVtWOwGIz8Vpn_eMwiIs5ZUZa2dWhBzWM04SqWNyRfvEbf2YHJbiiORDrBRCHiY657clx9FVRfHBKsfmWz3KGlbFAv_esecLqWfKnI9uxLCNc0EUuStlgB9TW9DOED8GlmI96rsx6blDVqh6Kuu-j3gEDrePVb8%3D)

Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last year**we were charged with unlawful use of a weapon.**

**Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around.**

**I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms.**

I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for.

The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us.

**I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life.**

**[Will you stand with me against the MOB by joining my team today? Please watch my announcement video and add your name to my McCloskey for Senate campaign team.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5e82a2c27b2d4f44acc211854794dd68&_e=-VAwT1zTLsERAnqzq_QFdgQYRd_nWETbd17pwg6IqIl3_qODH6AjKuKnlPb0L2K4OjlcEzazdJ4guDkYGP3oECtrswTkxI_K7wS6UnLmairyjKKk2xs-aXxFc66yHyvk7pjdtq10WHSiJtZnsuXvTPCWm-W1GNN2h0-SRW-SMscYpa8an-ayRLZOMYth7CgifA9vY4_EY7rwFEJpU3Jx75Z7zN-5nBmBGGTG5Kg4Zz-BiLh5CycIVLA2B5PAk1EbuFyJ2z6xOuWZiSB8D_9GexnNdn5nAkCbO_ZucscMs1IEAszj561hC22qccRJ4BMxxJSXRxOrpoE_3a8ymWZylaiSTwnZGCssOAA1OIbiJimCLBfK_NwcpSoE5RfqZ4a5n2qaE24_lc8UWvQg7hdjyFOJwjsFy9QSPUbA_al6CP1TGoC3wZvXMKujOpIqXmLRvJ-VxIA_sSzW6dsKIZzJ7UOFAm9PPCjopDZAuWBzdWTxloxVO-gDWZrcNhz_ox8HCzYmrtldx_2soGhSzXWEFtC35Omtqx7HgZwh2n47eTRis9M_BbbgG7eW4bkLtSAvxmiadLpndn_qzSUBFU62pD1ac_bmeRon-s42Rcs7FyNHtJ_-aF04gyT6jp_48rNwOD1Ew_hjoP2yhiLjWtpuQeZk1AqvkdIGSxv5rkwcm0Y%3D)**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5e82a2c27b2d4f44acc211854794dd68&_e=-VAwT1zTLsERAnqzq_QFdgQYRd_nWETbd17pwg6IqIl3_qODH6AjKuKnlPb0L2K4OjlcEzazdJ4guDkYGP3oECtrswTkxI_K7wS6UnLmairyjKKk2xs-aXxFc66yHyvk7pjdtq10WHSiJtZnsuXvTPCWm-W1GNN2h0-SRW-SMscYpa8an-ayRLZOMYth7CgifA9vY4_EY7rwFEJpU3Jx75Z7zN-5nBmBGGTG5Kg4Zz-BiLh5CycIVLA2B5PAk1EbuFyJ2z6xOuWZiSB8D_9GexnNdn5nAkCbO_ZucscMs1IEAszj561hC22qccRJ4BMxxJSXRxOrpoE_3a8ymWZylaiSTwnZGCssOAA1OIbiJimCLBfK_NwcpSoE5RfqZ4a5n2qaE24_lc8UWvQg7hdjyFOJwjsFy9QSPUbA_al6CP1TGoC3wZvXMKujOpIqXmLRhDbjs3hg-OLBXRhVz5cJHpeC-OIp8mLDpYZ8WpL0-N9v1mdcS2WIbSunXwt-ROrLFH4Ot55RWW4CVm7ivQlBBdCGylMjVWQWyUW2HKe_uxtSJyLh-jhR2b7RqbBXo8Pn8WrAbAJlq0XGNcD92cYaDb23YYgnQXOx2-b1YR08lz6fzpv2deUuKgjJbtqb68potXbF_qTACX_RDsYHW5sfCF-pcoF76xVYhAvnT3yK-kY%3D)
[ WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO
STAND WITH ME AGAINST THE MOB »](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5e82a2c27b2d4f44acc211854794dd68&_e=-VAwT1zTLsERAnqzq_QFdgQYRd_nWETbd17pwg6IqIl3_qODH6AjKuKnlPb0L2K4OjlcEzazdJ4guDkYGP3oECtrswTkxI_K7wS6UnLmairyjKKk2xs-aXxFc66yHyvk7pjdtq10WHSiJtZnsuXvTPCWm-W1GNN2h0-SRW-SMscYpa8an-ayRLZOMYth7CgifA9vY4_EY7rwFEJpU3Jx75Z7zN-5nBmBGGTG5Kg4Zz-BiLh5CycIVLA2B5PAk1EbuFyJ2z6xOuWZiSB8D_9GexnNdn5nAkCbO_ZucscMs1IEAszj561hC22qccRJ4BMxxJSXRxOrpoE_3a8ymWZylaiSTwnZGCssOAA1OIbiJimCLBfK_NwcpSoE5RfqZ4a5n2qaE24_lc8UWvQg7hdjyFOJwjsFy9QSPUbA_al6CP1TGoC3wZvXMKujOpIqXmLRCOAEQOwrL2jlJyGfCe_ZT-bDIkv6szKd4UZmbppurdVeB0YhaGI2BEg-Vg5Jvn_Q3JufGRwUOzEgBea02QMRwqBqNqwTaqHlY3-E02f5c-ophBedHEIsaFWbEHzpMv24l7PevBsd868w-IvzbXfgl48c5Y__Qs6pYgZ8AxV_yr-zFpFqi3NGlN7KmGyO0yc7TuW07l-LdSC3DvFgMGwrttC_TZwhn_icT9wqc8DnnL8%3D)

**Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home.**

When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground.

When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back.

** I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now**.

Now,**[I’m asking for the honor of standing up and fighting for every American against the far-Left’s all-out-assault on our democratic freedoms](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5e82a2c27b2d4f44acc211854794dd68&_e=-VAwT1zTLsERAnqzq_QFdgQYRd_nWETbd17pwg6IqIl3_qODH6AjKuKnlPb0L2K4OjlcEzazdJ4guDkYGP3oECtrswTkxI_K7wS6UnLmairyjKKk2xs-aXxFc66yHyvk7pjdtq10WHSiJtZnsuXvTPCWm-W1GNN2h0-SRW-SMscYpa8an-ayRLZOMYth7CgifA9vY4_EY7rwFEJpU3Jx75Z7zN-5nBmBGGTG5Kg4Zz-BiLh5CycIVLA2B5PAk1EbuFyJ2z6xOuWZiSB8D_9GexnNdn5nAkCbO_ZucscMs1IEAszj561hC22qccRJ4BMxxJSXRxOrpoE_3a8ymWZylaiSTwnZGCssOAA1OIbiJimCLBfK_NwcpSoE5RfqZ4a5n2qaE24_lc8UWvQg7hdjyFOJwjsFy9QSPUbA_al6CP1TGoC3wZvXMKujOpIqXmLR4ej6sQqaisglVjiPDDF2jbiYBK_TWloeydqTsNN-dmGQXZKxPb8WqXV_1OkBoFEHHvtyHQmemD1GxJbO2nKyxR_y3D5h4cXEv_mKQIJ_ImDW8GF8Tl6I7xkJj-E9HO2iScps9fzkx9lKwyKnBcPnG9bF4vDht5Lu-q4ino8H2j675eZozuqHyyftVnqd0oP1LL67rmRYT2E6h02bGU3sZI4XzbFVZaMbcVlXFETcRtc%3D)**.

clean_body: When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that the freedoms we take for granted are worth ... When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. | Fellow American, During last year’s summer of violence and unrest, some in America took the opportunity to loot, pilfer, destroy property and tear apart people’s lives -- simply because they felt they were owed a debt for the injustices of generations past. When the mob begins to march -- whether it’s in the suburbs of St. Louis, Portland, OR, or Houston, TX – everyone is fair game, no one is safe from their rath. My name is Mark McCloskey and I’m proud I can say that when the mob came for me and my wife, we stood our ground. And the scariest part of all? What you saw happen to us could just as easily happen to any of you reading this email today. That’s why I have decided to answer a calling to stand up and defend the people of Missouri – and every freedom-loving American – by running for the U.S. Senate. Because of the actions my wife and I took to defend our lives and property, we were vilified by the left, and in October last yearwe were charged with unlawful use of a weapon. Today in America, it seems like Democrats in government are more interested in protecting criminals from honest citizens, rather than the other way around. I am not subject to intimidation and nothing will scare me from protecting our rights and freedoms. I’m a fighter. I won’t back down. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. The far-Left is hellbent on destroying America. They want us to hate each other. They want to divide us. I cannot in good conscience sit around while Marxists roam free without consequence, trying to destroy our suburban way of life. Let me be clear: neither my wife nor I discharged our weapon. Not a single individual was harmed. We became the go-to villains for the cancel culture left, simply for defending our home. When the BLM mob came to destroy my home – I stood my ground. When I was charged by the St. Louis County Attorney for exercising my constitutional right to bear arms – I fought back. I have always been a Republican. But I have never wanted to run for office. When the fascist mob came to my door. It woke me up. I saw what the future of America will be if we don’t stand up and defend our rights, now. Now,. Here is my ask of you today: Will you help me send a message to the BLM, the Fascist Left and Democrats in DC that we the people will not be silenced? If your answer is yes, Fellow American, you can count on me to protect and defend our Constitutional liberties. You can count on me to never run, hide, or quit when things get heated. I will never, ever stop defending you. And I will always defend our police. For America, Mark McCloskey | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails?

Hoosier Republican,

Hoosiers should be proud of Indiana, especially how we were able to weather the storm of the Covid-19 pandemic. While many states are struggling to recover from economic downturns caused by the virus, Indiana is THRIVING thanks to competent conservative leadership.

Under Governor Eric Holcomb and other Republican leaders in the state, Indiana had yet another year of record-breaking economic growth and job development.

In fact, Indiana’s unemployment is almost back to the pre-pandemic record low and we have more Hoosiers in the workforce today than we did before the pandemic hit.

But, under Governor Holcomb and Republican leaders, we aren’t taking our foot off the gas. That’s why we’re adding $10 million per year for manufacturing readiness grants. Indiana is #1 in manufacturing in the country per capita, and we are paving the path for even more jobs for Hoosiers.

We also invested in broadband expansion, especially in our rural areas, to make sure that every citizen has access to education and work-at-home opportunities.

But while Republicans have been hard at work making Indiana one of the top places in the country to live, work, and play, the Democrats have been setting their sights on us. They cannot stand that we’re doing so well under commonsense, conservative leadership, and they’ll do anything to stop us from showing the rest of America how it is done.

The coastal elites want nothing more than to bring a blue wave to the heartland, and they’re starting with Indiana. We need to make sure that we have the resources in place to fight back against their attacks and spread the truth about what effective leadership looks like.

Please help fill our war chest to fight back against the radical left by chipping in what you can right now. No amount is too small to make a big difference!

Friend,

That’s right: **enough cartel-produced fentanyl to kill every single person in New York City.**

This cannot go on any longer. Cities will be destroyed, families will lose loved ones, and our country will continue to be plagued by drugs sent over by the Mexican Cartels.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Expanding the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
The stakes are too high for us not to act.
#

Earlier this week, the Supreme Court announced it would hear a case that could severely restrict abortion rights in this country — and result in _Roe v. Wade_ being overturned. It’s the most direct threat to reproductive rights in more than 30 years.
This will be the first abortion case argued before the Supreme Court since Justice Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation. The Court now has a 6-3, far-right supermajority that does not believe in a person’s right to choose.
**It will take a miracle for the Supreme Court to rule in favor of abortion rights — unless we restore balance by expanding the Court.**
**[Please sign our petition to tell President Biden and Congress that we MUST expand the Supreme Court and enact judicial reforms. We cannot afford to sit back and let this Court roll back all the progress we’ve made in recent decades.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29475599/286528088/2141814179?refcode2=424f0bc1-8db9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210520-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjRmMGJjMS04ZGI5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-PDEhwVHq_tcyYORxomJMKOmeyLWKUpDUJAFXFVuJxE=&emci=726ceba3-8db9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=424f0bc1-8db9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=24719896)**
Last month, I introduced the _Judiciary Act of 2021_ , which would add 4 seats to the Supreme Court, immediately reversing the Republicans’ theft of the Court.
And before that, President Biden announced a commission to study expanding the Court and enacting other judicial reforms, such as term limits.
Expanding the Court through either executive or legislative action is possible — but doing neither leaves us in an untenable situation. Without expanding the Court, we risk losing abortion rights, voting rights, and our democracy itself. That’s not a risk worth taking.
**[We must fight for our progressive values and expand the Court. If you agree, please add your name to our petition.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29475600/286528089/2141814179?refcode2=424f0bc1-8db9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&refcode=em210520-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjRmMGJjMS04ZGI5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-PDEhwVHq_tcyYORxomJMKOmeyLWKUpDUJAFXFVuJxE=&emci=726ceba3-8db9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=424f0bc1-8db9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=24719896)**
Thank you for adding your voice.
Onward,
Mondaire

clean_body: The stakes are too high for us not to act. Earlier this week, the Supreme Court announced it would hear a case that could severely restrict abortion rights in this country — and result in Roe v. Wade being overturned. It’s the most direct threat to reproductive rights in more than 30 years. This will be the first abortion case argued before the Supreme Court since Justice Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation. The Court now has a 6-3, far-right supermajority that does not believe in a person’s right to choose. It will take a miracle for the Supreme Court to rule in favor of abortion rights — unless we restore balance by expanding the Court. Last month, I introduced the Judiciary Act of 2021 , which would add 4 seats to the Supreme Court, immediately reversing the Republicans’ theft of the Court. And before that, President Biden announced a commission to study expanding the Court and enacting other judicial reforms, such as term limits. Expanding the Court through either executive or legislative action is possible — but doing neither leaves us in an untenable situation. Without expanding the Court, we risk losing abortion rights, voting rights, and our democracy itself. That’s not a risk worth taking. Thank you for adding your voice. body:
The crazy thing here is
Friend, it's late in the day so I'll be quick.
I was just going over the numbers ahead of our major fundraising deadline at midnight, and we are still trying to catch up in the MUST WIN Texas Special Election Runoff.
Look, I'm not the kind of guy who normally asks for help like this -- but we truly have everything on the line in this race.
**We crunched the numbers and the crazy thing is, we are only 4 contributions short. Just 4.**
[**So, I want to personally ask you, will you chip in right now just $5 bucks so that we can reach our goal and keep us in this must-win race?**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HQ7uR_n3LldpjviF3dqgqh6poOdjO6SQ268PXBNyKhGZGwY7Ol5Vg8TLjbmao3Dpty4nj6rgRxSpAOcCg4MWsskgUk5I_m2ebYYtEyH25uWFipbTK53-hsBQ0dnfpgG1EagoEdxc3QC84sT8-pkKU0oGEsOQiqlT1P6o0jQHh6CvS-bLrxvoLiiq4xbyT6PqBfRaO5d9e6z0jfUj_geVUnBZVW0a1Wp7yRitFtMITW-2sPI29OTV3hWH4UFv520jpF87tkX1LljIJxI0pJmE8dp1GIIGig3Evm4h8mueNQ1fHsKySsGFzsFIzCqhF46TURQ-4yDhy6nW8kVQAvigPnTSEK5KfrR1p5QDM0dX6zhZVyZUCh29ers_mm-L1najpqIu5K_tYG3EuTUqMEd37HiuHFVz1nRFHUMAvHctCUh2hdIjkVxEJjjmcGAYsk9a&c=d2WiKYZL83Z8urZrT4KHCXK7ErpOg2GT3oXtd4rPVOAEgzljqwnYiQ==&ch=4tCybuwHAZTRzgMjXKgywYsxgB1-TqKbpWYfEP4P5pISCvw_IDa5MQ==)

Winning this race will let us put the brakes on the disastrous Pelosi, Biden agenda. We know they've poured millions into Texas before and will stop at nothing to add this state into their column.
That's why we need grassroots conservatives like you to help us before it's too late -- [**please chip in just a few bucks tonight ahead of our deadline.**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HQ7uR_n3LldpjviF3dqgqh6poOdjO6SQ268PXBNyKhGZGwY7Ol5Vg8TLjbmao3Dpty4nj6rgRxSpAOcCg4MWsskgUk5I_m2ebYYtEyH25uWFipbTK53-hsBQ0dnfpgG1EagoEdxc3QC84sT8-pkKU0oGEsOQiqlT1P6o0jQHh6CvS-bLrxvoLiiq4xbyT6PqBfRaO5d9e6z0jfUj_geVUnBZVW0a1Wp7yRitFtMITW-2sPI29OTV3hWH4UFv520jpF87tkX1LljIJxI0pJmE8dp1GIIGig3Evm4h8mueNQ1fHsKySsGFzsFIzCqhF46TURQ-4yDhy6nW8kVQAvigPnTSEK5KfrR1p5QDM0dX6zhZVyZUCh29ers_mm-L1najpqIu5K_tYG3EuTUqMEd37HiuHFVz1nRFHUMAvHctCUh2hdIjkVxEJjjmcGAYsk9a&c=d2WiKYZL83Z8urZrT4KHCXK7ErpOg2GT3oXtd4rPVOAEgzljqwnYiQ==&ch=4tCybuwHAZTRzgMjXKgywYsxgB1-TqKbpWYfEP4P5pISCvw_IDa5MQ==)

name: Michelle Steel
subject: Here is how we show Newsom the door
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
California deserves leaders who support our taxpayers, support our students, and who support our economy.
****

.

[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_bYgRIvgCNG-1qPgnF3iBlIv14ZGVONTCy-xI1gXtRFtJi4JLtRuPZKsCty2WZan-07C54XVB0OpGzO7xTdpBMHsBYI71kLQ-Tg0YvP_UkCV1HcYuGYL39Mt6hMHK6nEFidu8OG545YkDLandocjQD202gjUiFpW2KzR-kURWGcxHeFT76Wfkx-3Cie7Ytzs-3GWMsjrhDdn6afGse4otZUyQIyNSYtKgP56OEY0F1vlf5YsAG3XzFQmFITeBMFNS9FmekuSFLKqUP3B8SfttilmxXkVnFB8bqbeKGtoUQKb_7e3eCGkyUQxrZghuVi-eA1OtlaOSQWQp0tW_4H0gaPcrtEG1n2PGi53YxyQAHrbmiztX4RKuNG07o_Lq9y_7RojiBoo6GwylPyW5oxKIzREzteEbszEqFpiusxmKCrAJvWSphqH7BHgb59E_3BQ&c=MuSUOej9lsRwXBU1L01CTkkRgddboFWC2pUB9ACByNv_f2aIVxWe_g==&ch=QczWkJMFFk3WmKJtzfSzCHKCfVIYUWZe2Q3piWiPvHjF_MkFezQSgQ==) Friend,

California deserves leaders who support our taxpayers, our students, and our economy. **Gavin Newsom is not that leader right now - and he needs to go.**

Newsom has broken his promises, crippled our state's economy, overseen a mass exodus of businesses from California, and is responsible for our students falling behind in their studies by keeping them out of the classroom. _Clearly, Newsom has lost the confidence of the very people who elected him._

I am helping to lead the charge and to replace Newsom with common-sense conservative leadership. [**If you think Gavin 's got to go, you can help by rushing in as little as $10 right now to show him the door.**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_bYgRIvgCNG-1qPgnF3iBlIv14ZGVONTCy-xI1gXtRFtJi4JLtRuPZKsCty2WZanCcoIPeCSt15ypteUoI-w0N8C1kK9MRZK-JKWdpn4KARfQbAtmXC9QPFXcfmiOI1i9acYbVd0pTqQklW2sM6NzO56REGGnwcm7C0YxVt5tmKBINEzUzckClRK-Ip_MPnQPaCBMRyhFmJ0PTCwxS5-t9fI91bU752MO7kluUkD_vZFCevvPMZfVyJvbfQ8Ctqo7oZMvVWR2X7bJZ8tzoluU2ix1_ZkuzGO3k_idfAn80ZZuEjtUaP5GWsE6MBIm_QG4yfl9m6Q-iPMPft4-Y80pPrqOstrV4_w3g9IQdijKoE89CTBummLmWpUskefFaUa_5g7xbPS1-1v1XUSKtcCYGhv_vpRAhTmPsKOjOIGfMMqtTvXk9ApZs2WQr0dRjbGQ27A1VZZY4DJM6oLQuMwcQ==&c=MuSUOej9lsRwXBU1L01CTkkRgddboFWC2pUB9ACByNv_f2aIVxWe_g==&ch=QczWkJMFFk3WmKJtzfSzCHKCfVIYUWZe2Q3piWiPvHjF_MkFezQSgQ==)

Conservatives are working overtime to replace Newsom with someone who will keep their promise with the people of California. We need YOUR help to make that happen, though. clean_body: California deserves leaders who support our taxpayers, support our students, and who support our economy. ** . == Friend, California deserves leaders who support our taxpayers, our students, and our economy. Gavin Newsom is not that leader right now - and he needs to go. Newsom has broken his promises, crippled our state's economy, overseen a mass exodus of businesses from California, and is responsible for our students falling behind in their studies by keeping them out of the classroom. Clearly, Newsom has lost the confidence of the very people who elected him. I am helping to lead the charge and to replace Newsom with common-sense conservative leadership. == Conservatives are working overtime to replace Newsom with someone who will keep their promise with the people of California. We need YOUR help to make that happen, though. == | == == == ==** Thank you, Michelle Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativevictory2020.net powered by

body:
Won't even make it to Election Day

[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nm6RW1eNP8258cEPJzMxUzChiULXG4svYQY3-gQ4qTkOn4uyT8PsQWvtCSVeKt0xDqlNwzl5xOQ-X4chyEKKo5s-_hpADf1B6X6SQ7Uy3-KKujnyhYqZKXPG-h2UfKZzwmhcTmh9uZfQMZg9nog2rWITDaOQWh1iejaArinIBKawRK1o6FUwTWdY_YK7G_ZZfPdpXTkc1ZxQHP1zsvrEv9LhUgrGjjQggqmdblC-l4mbTbtmLUdjKCIOLUCKJIRsEjLP67S_1iJR591NDSDM14sryvB4lCge2wRcdTxbw8v5n-ffvhB9uaOTcvMMUI9qohPxHoclJTF4N2NISjO0zruQOFEJ4_N10tlx5AD_Q26Qqcutl9ejRZDcxM49GsRanKBGo8fhcLFytmTCZ3XAlTmfpo_bsm8yUKwOTVjQ1HsxPBZVsxKJNku15C31tHX9VFQgO3JJpEGt2KvMQFGONR6K5y8avr3C3UZSis2B1hQ=&c=DYWOL54x6NBMUUkwYbOOe5vhQ1K3kG1ayRijSni79O6C1r9dNmOeLw==&ch=W5WAJAJ5jebz1EmoRCe3-Lya0xeg0AH9-APxY77qZXgyr4yXlV_xQQ==)

Friend, we didn't sleep last night.
We are fighting for our lives in the must-win Texas Special Election Runoff -- and now our contributions are starting to dry up.
Worst of all, there are only **HOURS to go before the first MAJOR FEC Special Election Runoff fundraising deadline.**
If we can't turn this around, we might not even make it to Election Day.
[**That 's why we are asking you to please chip in just $3 bucks before midnight tonight so that we can turn this around, keep Texas RED, and finally start to retire Pelosi. **](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nm6RW1eNP8258cEPJzMxUzChiULXG4svYQY3-gQ4qTkOn4uyT8PsQWvtCSVeKt0xDqlNwzl5xOQ-X4chyEKKo5s-_hpADf1B6X6SQ7Uy3-KKujnyhYqZKXPG-h2UfKZzwmhcTmh9uZfQMZg9nog2rWITDaOQWh1iejaArinIBKawRK1o6FUwTWdY_YK7G_ZZfPdpXTkc1ZxQHP1zsvrEv9LhUgrGjjQggqmdblC-l4mbTbtmLUdjKCIOLUCKJIRsEjLP67S_1iJR591NDSDM14sryvB4lCge2wRcdTxbw8v5n-ffvhB9uaOTcvMMUI9qohPxHoclJTF4N2NISjO0zruQOFEJ4_N10tlx5AD_Q26Qqcutl9ejRZDcxM49GsRanKBGo8fhcLFytmTCZ3XAlTmfpo_bsm8yUKwOTVjQ1HsxPBZVsxKJNku15C31tHX9VFQgO3JJpEGt2KvMQFGONR6K5y8avr3C3UZSis2B1hQ=&c=DYWOL54x6NBMUUkwYbOOe5vhQ1K3kG1ayRijSni79O6C1r9dNmOeLw==&ch=W5WAJAJ5jebz1EmoRCe3-Lya0xeg0AH9-APxY77qZXgyr4yXlV_xQQ==)
Take a look at what we are seeing right now:
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nm6RW1eNP8258cEPJzMxUzChiULXG4svYQY3-gQ4qTkOn4uyT8PsQWvtCSVeKt0xDqlNwzl5xOQ-X4chyEKKo5s-_hpADf1B6X6SQ7Uy3-KKujnyhYqZKXPG-h2UfKZzwmhcTmh9uZfQMZg9nog2rWITDaOQWh1iejaArinIBKawRK1o6FUwTWdY_YK7G_ZZfPdpXTkc1ZxQHP1zsvrEv9LhUgrGjjQggqmdblC-l4mbTbtmLUdjKCIOLUCKJIRsEjLP67S_1iJR591NDSDM14sryvB4lCge2wRcdTxbw8v5n-ffvhB9uaOTcvMMUI9qohPxHoclJTF4N2NISjO0zruQOFEJ4_N10tlx5AD_Q26Qqcutl9ejRZDcxM49GsRanKBGo8fhcLFytmTCZ3XAlTmfpo_bsm8yUKwOTVjQ1HsxPBZVsxKJNku15C31tHX9VFQgO3JJpEGt2KvMQFGONR6K5y8avr3C3UZSis2B1hQ=&c=DYWOL54x6NBMUUkwYbOOe5vhQ1K3kG1ayRijSni79O6C1r9dNmOeLw==&ch=W5WAJAJ5jebz1EmoRCe3-Lya0xeg0AH9-APxY77qZXgyr4yXlV_xQQ==)
It's not easy for us to share this, but we have to show you how bleak this looks.

name: Kevin Hern
subject: Reclaiming the future
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
This week I introduced the only budget you’ll see in Washington. Check it out >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/abc546886cd6e8e1/cb2d3eb02a5d7f17c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Dear Peter, This week, I introduced a budget for fiscal year 2022 alongside Republican Study Committee Chairman Jim Banks. It’s full of common-sense spending measures, helps restore fiscal responsibility in Washington, D.C., and works for Americans at every single income level. Unlike Democrats who haven’t produced a budget in well over 2 years, my Republican colleagues and I understand that in order to strengthen America we must get our financial house in order! We saw under President Trump that pro-growth policies work. When you give Americans more control over their hard-earned income, great things happen! Markets, consumer confidence, and revenues grow across the board. Layer that on top of tax cuts, and you’ve got a winning strategy that puts Americans first. I’m working to get the message out on this budget, but****[**I need your help doing that**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/abc546886cd6e8e1/077d205c3415dcd9c3d6b838967d376c/34143). Not just by calling more moderate Democrats and encouraging them to read the bill and support it, but by donating today so we can work to educate Americans on what this bill includes. Things like:

• Balancing the budget in 5 years

• Reducing spending by $14.4 trillion over 10 years

• Reduction of the overall tax burden by $1.9 trillion (that’s almost $16,000 per household!)

• No money to directly or indirectly facilitate or subsidize abortions

• Secures our border

• Eliminates earmarks

• Outlines real health care reform to lower costs and increase accessibility to quality care

• And so much more! If you agree with these points and that we need to get our nation back on track with spending, [**please donate today**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/abc546886cd6e8e1/437644f6388972dac3d6b838967d376c/34143). Let’s let Congress know we need a plan! Nancy Pelosi has already instructed the House Budget Committee not to prepare a budget. She wants to continue to spend without reverence. But to every penny spent without accountability. Our budget is thorough and floor ready. Now that the process of drafting a strong conservative budget is over, we begin the pressure campaign to bring it to the floor. **[Please help make this a reality today!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/abc546886cd6e8e1/ddf18de358dfe9d8c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** -Kevin Hern [**BRING FISCAL SANITY TO WASHINGTON >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/abc546886cd6e8e1/884286d901f2ba79c3d6b838967d376c/34143) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/abc546886cd6e8e1/6aaf1018fb79313bc3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/abc546886cd6e8e1/ae520fbb1e9d015fc3d6b838967d376c/34143)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: This veteran’s story broke my heart
body:
Recently, Help22 therapists spoke with a former Navy SEAL. You know, the toughest of the tough.
| | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/BVqqIgrFiA892e6LOa5dLTAg/2RbBTalDGVwKPcs3BZzC4A) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Help22.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/BVqqIgrFiA892e6LOa5dLTAg/2RbBTalDGVwKPcs3BZzC4A)**.
---

---
| [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/BVqqIgrFiA892e6LOa5dLTAg/2RbBTalDGVwKPcs3BZzC4A)
[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/BVqqIgrFiA892e6LOa5dLTAg/2RbBTalDGVwKPcs3BZzC4A) I'm not a crier, Patriot.

But this story broke my heart.

Recently, Help22 therapists spoke with a former Navy SEAL. You know, the toughest of the tough.

Since leaving the service, he struggled with something that so many veterans face: **What does your life look like when you 're no longer part of the military?**

He was unemployed. He was deeply despondent. He didn't know what to do with his life, or what should come next, or who to turn to.

When your entire job is being brave, **it 's so hard to admit that you're afraid**.

Thankfully, **he turned to Help22**. We got him the free counseling and coaching he needed... And that made it possible for him to make sense of the trauma he lived through and begin a new career.

But I'll be honest, Patriot: **_He was one of the lucky ones_**.

**Every single day, 22 veterans commit suicide.**

The future looks so dark to them, so hopeless, that they end their own lives--these brave men and women, these people who put their lives on the line to defend our country and our families.

We founded Help22 to prevent this needless, preventable tragedy. **22 suicides a day.** That's why we're building a network of life coaches, therapists, social workers and psychiatrists who donate 1 day each month to give free treatment to veterans. Absolutely free.

Help22 is giving our heroes the chance to live the lives they deserve. These men and women are a national treasure. Let's treasure them.

[**We can only go as far as your help.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/BVqqIgrFiA892e6LOa5dLTAg/2RbBTalDGVwKPcs3BZzC4A)

[**Will you donate $11, $24, or even $49 to ensure we have the resources to keep these brave warriors alive?**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/BVqqIgrFiA892e6LOa5dLTAg/2RbBTalDGVwKPcs3BZzC4A)

[**Make your most generous, tax-deductible donation now.**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/BVqqIgrFiA892e6LOa5dLTAg/2RbBTalDGVwKPcs3BZzC4A)

Thanks for your help,

Commander Kirk Lippold
US Navy (Ret.)

Help22 is pending as a Tax Exempt Organization Under Section 501(C)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Your Donations will be Tax Deductible As Allowed by Federal Law and the Laws of Various States upon approval.

---

For the Radical Left, your personal freedoms and liberties aren't as big of a concern as them maintaining power in Congress. Mandate after mandate, tax increase after tax increase, burdensome regulations and red tape. These are all part of the Radical Left's agenda. We need to stand up to this now before it 's too late. Republican Michelle Steel is fighting for the people of Orange County, the people of California, and everyone across America. But the Left is going to put up a fight, which is why we need your help, Friend. == == | == == == Until we can retake the House Majority, the Left will continue to try to run our lives and tax us into the ground. We have to take a stand now before they can do any further harm. name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GODLEWSKI FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Dear Peter,

We launched this campaign for the U.S. Senate just over one month ago, and what a privilege it's been to travel across Wisconsin. I've driven from Oshkosh to Ashland, Milwaukee to Eau Claire, La Crosse to Superior, and everywhere in between to talk with Wisconsinites about our fight to take down Ron Johnson.

Let me explain why. My mother always told me we were given two ears and one mouth for a reason: because we should listen more than we talk. Being a good leader starts with understanding what people need. Part of running for office is just showing up.

That's why I've stood with courageous nurses at the Capitol, visited women-owned small businesses in Janesville, toured Wisconsin Aluminum Foundry Co. in Manitowoc, helped clean up our shoreline with Friends of Lake Superior Reserve, met with leaders of the Ho-Chunk Nation, heard inspiring stories from Hmong women professionals in Wausau, and so much more.

I gotta tell you, everywhere I've gone, I've been amazed by our state's perseverance, generosity, and courage. It's been a tough year for all of us: small business owners are still struggling from the economic toll of this pandemic and countless folks are still out of work. But Wisconsinites are ready to do whatever it takes to get our state and our country back on track -- and we're more than willing to lend a helping hand to our neighbors in need.

We need someone in the Senate who will be a partner in that effort. I want to take my fight for working families to Washington where I'll work to raise the minimum wage, put Main Street ahead of Wall Street, combat the threat of climate change, and expand access to quality and affordable health care.

I'm grateful to have you in this fight with me because I can't get to Washington alone.

Thank you,

Sarah

Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today.

CONTRIBUTE >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/godlewski-may-21

If you are a registered lobbyist and have received this email in error, please contact us here [info@sarahforwisconsin.com] .
PAID FOR BY GODLEWSKI FOR WISCONSIN
Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
United States
Sarah relies on this grassroots team to fund her campaign, but if you no longer wish to receive emails from us, you can unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6dcaad23-86b9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed/f9d5ef02-91b9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWQ1ZWYwMi05MWI5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jFnCKtgyahLjFgsdXotnegShMNIolTXzDcAtr39iP1I=&id=121241219 .https://www.sarahforwisconsin.com/ [https://www.sarahforwisconsin.com/]

Part of running for office is just showing up. That's why I've stood with courageous nurses at the Capitol, visited women-owned small businesses in Janesville, toured Wisconsin Aluminum Foundry Co. in Manitowoc, helped clean up our shoreline with Friends of Lake Superior Reserve, met with leaders of the Ho-Chunk Nation, heard inspiring stories from Hmong women professionals in Wausau, and so much more. I gotta tell you, everywhere I've gone, I've been amazed by our state's perseverance, generosity, and courage. It's been a tough year for all of us: small business owners are still struggling from the economic toll of this pandemic and countless folks are still out of work. But Wisconsinites are ready to do whatever it takes to get our state and our country back on track -- and we're more than willing to lend a helping hand to our neighbors in need. We need someone in the Senate who will be a partner in that effort. I want to take my fight for working families to Washington where I'll work to raise the minimum wage, put Main Street ahead of Wall Street, combat the threat of climate change, and expand access to quality and affordable health care. I'm grateful to have you in this fight with me because I can't get to Washington alone. Thank you, Sarah Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today. CONTRIBUTE >> If you are a registered lobbyist and have received this email in error, please contact us here [info@sarahforwisconsin.com] . PAID FOR BY GODLEWSKI FOR WISCONSIN Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States Sarah relies on this grassroots team to fund her campaign, but if you no longer wish to receive emails from us, you can unsubscribe: . []

It's now been _**4 WEEKS**_ since Democrats passed the DC Statehood bill in the House.

_What does this mean?_ It means Democrat Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer has spent _**4 WEEKS**_ thinking up a scheme to ensure this passes the Senate, finally granting statehood to DC.

[**Schumer has everything to gain, and nothing to lose from passing this bill. Adding DC as the 51st state would give liberals one more seat in the House, and TWO more seats in the Senate. It 's all just a power grab.**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xmnSgbF8KP7oEulNsNNlL4OxqvoM9-dMK9a-GKS8e7GM8sGa7H8NQRe8lQqOf1BsOsFoAIa7qjtDXOqk1RUYZUh9ba7vQt5cDp0kX7--cyBK53A0_l8CAuVUcWFLvV67_gAoBkNorr5Sdwz2IMlfMjWqv23BMWjjlLsjU_o3RjJoIjSq4IVxGDImWKxlGXNV5Os5qTn0zm72ehUq_qBzi55ucYGjJ6OvLOafN13l4CIoc1aC7RxoYrkoZ_zMf4v4CCFXOvW_usxdnezoZ3_u5aFq6V55zzMyNwcebsiOTVDU8D7pGwfE_frxeg2hfn4lS5-XbMGc_Anpb389TciBajL_KI3qrs6EEccdPirLZ00LXMKc8wActgsfnkC0weqgwrh1vhisIhIvcjDA2naXl1DFWzlUwtjDlm3V-vEzpV4_N-VM6e7XLt8_BNTGUSjI&c=52yJq7mVw1eLjpnhIrmnmokSigAQtekMHWT2plDjH2MRyhB6S4Nciw==&ch=uxLDS7idejTOwxcjJ03bSGqsXDRa4Btsh1_YyT3t23SmH4X5aaNzcw==)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I need you to look at this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Pelosi and her DC pals are working overtime to pick one of their loyal liberal allies to run against me, and they may have even found someone already that they think will be able to raise millions of dollars in an effort to beat me. Just look at this MSNBC headline:
|
---
| | | Friend,

Pelosi and her DC pals are working overtime to pick one of their loyal liberal allies to run against me, and they may have even found someone already that they think will be able to raise millions of dollars in an effort to beat me. Just look at this MSNBC headline:

While I am not nervous about a challenger announcing -- I've been through that before -- I need to make sure my campaign is able to keep up financially. These liberal challengers have very close ties to Barack Obama, Joe Biden, and Nancy Pelosi and a network of billionaire donors.

I am ready for this fight, but I want to make sure my team has everything it needs from yard signs to field offices to pizza for our volunteers (they are the ones that really make a campaign **happen!**).** So after talking with my team, we are going to be extending your access to become a Founding Member for another 24 HOURS. **

You don't want to see all the work President Trump did to keep Florida red ERASED, do you? **_[Claim your Founding Membership before midnight, Friend.>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010xsFX1ZbMsZuCLqi6IwnmphEP3fn1upZ3wDUt8OWi6Kf1dfHN6vxI9byGntfP9P0dWVPUy8_ECcYczajdbW-l5lGG3ddBaMEMtVaOveUaaqrXZb8sbMycxpp5cPgwajco0nvWTVJEcSxomxo9ARjSP4NxiDSadVkK8c5s3am39YyRhVx9KkVA6W3CkujT8ebc6a3KHkXBsgYD5N8VtUTcg6Eo6wFXama7_6cJ9qps3NwVvJL8T4Zz3mQYczjKfv-zUcckX2wMgFK_E_X87gP5zeiPIKAEFm7a2Tz_kvPrtRnCTqGGHMxSDKSEVe02uVrzZBKSLEk9ZQhLoFIOBar8pDmWp1g3E75fdHstCMfFIGYEQ9oIvWU46BtWzjxo3L59A7HZhK08MiKtSwZOACaVg1Pn1TSso2Ni4KKqS_nESX31ZDJrg3Go7G5-CmmJAtU&c=ek4we97ihMbUTfJ663PVlyff1Jvjzjk8FJeDEkOHZMSkZ-6LSBo6IA==&ch=iTJpa2r1eT2Dr0TkB9TINBJfhiEdCiTD4zoEUUg3qeJYaWn6n1h8jQ== "Claim your Founding Membership before midnight, %%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%. >>")_**
I am not going to lie, this race will be long and tough if we don't have a strong team, and we simply cannot do this without you, Friend.

Thank you,
Marco Rubio

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: Critical Race Theory - Are the foundations of American society racist? I discuss on Newsmax & in the Washington Times
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f912053e75a6/happy-thanksgiving-from-milwaukee-4791641?e=c2296cffff)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope this email finds you well.

Every few weeks when I pen a note to you, I think,_"How can it get any worse?"_ and then it happens. Something crazier takes hold and worries me even more about the future of our country. The latest? **Critical Race Theory**.

Critical Race Theory (CRT) is **race-focused education** that declares that foundations of American society are i**nherently racist** and that **systemic racism** negatively impacts **opportunities and treatment** of people of color at all levels of society.

Critical Race Theory says we must _**hold back** bright and ambitious brown and black students_ _because Anglo and Asian-American students benefit more_ , while other ethnicities and races are disadvantaged. **This is patently false, not based in science and is flat out racist.**

I agree with a black mother from Loudon County, Virginia who earlier this month voiced her concerns about CRT at a school board hearing, _"**CRT is not a 'nice dialogue,' ...it is racist; it is abusive; it discriminates against one's color." **_

This line of thinking sows racial divisions in the classroom, and **pits American child against American child**. Yet Democrats and even the **White House press secretary Jen Psaki says that it is “responsible” **to teach students about systemic racism. **Unbelievable.

See my article below that was published in the Washington Times yesterday on Critical Race Theory. **

**_[](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=44c8cc003f&e=c2296cffff)_**

It's hard to believe all the damage that our nation has sustained in the first 120 days of Joe Biden's America; **a southern border crisis,** a **400 percent spike** in the price of lumber, the **highest gas prices** we've since in a decade and now,**__a push for Critical Race Theory, free community college REGARDLESS OF INCOME, and free universal pre-K with NO PARENTAL WORK REQUIREMENTS.__**
_We know why our Founding Fathers had the foresight to have Congressional elections every two years; so that that there is a**check and balance** on our government which is under one-party rule._
**So what's the solution?** Elect conservative candidates in 2022 who can _**win**_ Congressional seats. Period.

**We must regain control of the House and Senate and fire Pelosi and Schumer from their majority leadership positions. **

We are only _**five**_ seats shy in the House, and one seat shy in the Senate. This MUST be done so we can stop President Biden from pushing race-based educational curriculums in our schools. Our children deserve better.
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=c12ef76d34&e=c2296cffff)
---
Newsmax interview on May 13, 2021 discussing Critical Race Theory.
|
---
|
#
* * *

I would love to hear your thoughts on this! Please feel free to email me directly. Also, to see my television appearances on a variety of political topics, please follow me on:
**Facebook: Amanda Makki for Congress
Instagram: amandamakki
Twitter: @amandamakki**

Thank you!
Amanda Makki

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37657d4bde0a4a269800be7ebbb14b73&_e=-oV7SZbmZb0saEJ8SRT5MgsWp6puouXzSG47eJLVsGBIiZf_vcsxYwzp689iqGCK-aafTvb5-kcRMeFwJsMt22J05_uS4572PcbP3YQwqdRPaAZAKo5Cbqb9JagvcBsFsSuVMaVti_WzXtrnREhfgb2C5UcaXcIkZzadW243Ain6vjohwx2mEXFUsi24G6y83AewGyU6DPFcNsi8WdnmAUQdgu3LUCIeHHbE_ISXtR2_PSTUKAMmyWMMG-9_WSIgTUcrW6pKHow2vyyV7uh_9X0aGCOvcnapW4kChVJwSZgdHuxzGACipRZ3as3hA52-nR1Lntx0wvLJMXvVzYw73fUm9UFEjEs1Rb_py5dES9V5qPZWob7_QaeTw-_0ryuqoUUlLh5dfKgPPMReV4N1KlzEuNdos4zelxGgDpYVRK9QRiaIN35fafcVM538LKXEve4vqacMNlZfiOYg1RI5bA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Hillsdale College now offers our full online course **“The Second World Wars” as a special DVD box set** for your home library or to give as a gift.
This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from renowned military historian Victor Davis Hanson of the Allied and Axis strategies in the air, by water, and on earth that led to the victory of the Allies. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37657d4bde0a4a269800be7ebbb14b73&_e=-oV7SZbmZb0saEJ8SRT5MgsWp6puouXzSG47eJLVsGBIiZf_vcsxYwzp689iqGCK-aafTvb5-kcRMeFwJsMt22J05_uS4572PcbP3YQwqdRPaAZAKo5Cbqb9JagvcBsFsSuVMaVti_WzXtrnREhfgb2C5UcaXcIkZzadW243Ain6vjohwx2mEXFUsi24G6y83AewGyU6DPFcNsi8WdnmAUQdgu3LUCIeHHbE_ISXtR2_PSTUKAMmyWMMG-9_WSIgShvIuhnU_gWBW-jrranv5Hpy4wy5hM6SlVoiITZpIkcuwypSpdKTIwPWbJJlc5OKSE_uIhHz67kULrvtH4BiGm2MsdrbYh5u8FiyyNvJ1_T7uvFCB0FeZmoQcgaG4rDgUf4qSg2v8PmnUh9jaEGTd7Yu3fFXRfFS8u3G-i4YfJavm5B42L6TOeOQh5JBwKJat_lJDNfmxinrFgeIVaeTxQ%3D%3D) If you would like to secure a DVD set before they’re no longer available, you can do so by giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College and its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.
You can give a gift and reserve your DVD box set of **“The Second World Wars”** using this secure link:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=37657d4bde0a4a269800be7ebbb14b73&_e=-oV7SZbmZb0saEJ8SRT5MgsWp6puouXzSG47eJLVsGBIiZf_vcsxYwzp689iqGCK-aafTvb5-kcRMeFwJsMt22J05_uS4572PcbP3YQwqdRPaAZAKo5Cbqb9JagvcBsFsSuVMaVti_WzXtrnREhfgb2C5UcaXcIkZzadW243Ain6vjohwx2mEXFUsi24G6y83AewGyU6DPFcNsi8WdnmAUQdgu3LUCIeHHbE_ISXtR2_PSTUKAMmyWMMG-9_WSIgqY2s1uw8_6jAt5_rp5RVuGfGbA3ahpgnMh7uLeqgRIoyFrrbVfi_NpTTY36V0Zn1GDi1xfAe4qGgHX-Ou9MzL-O99wh1X58Q7c_ViE4OTq_8Nqum_cqP7lzRdESKCmsx84CvgYkE3V1CoZ6HfaWDARGmLxrq0_RvCJvskFpcgsbxGavxQZ63YzxOBTLJk3BBFLRFOFjuHbHnaHlf3EfJ3g%3D%3D)**

Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
subject: Pelosi Just Fined Me $500 for Following the Science
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blaine For Congress
body:
Power Hungry Nancy Pelosi just fined me $500 for not wearing a mask on the House floor even though the CDC says it's time to take off the stupid masks!
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EO5vTPfsyDP6byJx58GTsi3XyGzLjlVBQGSe7ioLQ8ffGcF2lP9os9xGcV2hxDJ1-YmJjBt1btwJA2g3-ucURkIlHaaHQ5St9wx6ZKxtzWwLS2TygSZvWqogC1wDqLzVnWICnb57sn7UaPNgqRuPTayJLZDugO1yIEg1rb3kYM-F-ecaJNrMLW_4JPCEZKtsaTp6WFD9w9jkodbm5bj4BXlGOzIcVhdEDn3XeKZhgqVu9Bm_BSwm0th6hH9pjGlSNZp-FOCTyRlrY4xoqdhyGl4bnpNMC9hTNUUOKSg4XoTGOhZIQ14XZtl--o8xhfPZ9_KUjLEumQ0X3X-_LPiX9nVH7DyEl6wxMcxjiul0Jp4DYlFZqLP78FsyVpvIwer1ytlX5OXvCaZ0sO76Mk5mpupPpdl9eDDimDp5ySXVSP-nnxy_n97zUEL2loecM-_sV42RicEjeRu88847UDAFSbxged2YIYtfHd-9tSwjhUagPocagU_k0YsIH1ubJfNC&c=NtU_zUYuSJvgPc0o7BHAebMC_GxcCQUZV-fvWB6KUgoCH3Gm_jDXEA==&ch=NJ5ub9ujaijOsKy0BFDOn58HWsZtCQDl7vs6JMT9r1moM6Uc7LdOWg==)
**URGENT MESSAGE FROM SSG BRIAN MAST, U.S. ARMY (RET.):**

Patriot,

I fought to defend our freedom against attacks from radical Islamic terrorists in Afghanistan, and now the very same freedom I fought to defend is under attack from Nancy Pelosi here at home:

**Power Hungry Nancy Pelosi just fined me $500 for not wearing a mask on the House floor even though the CDC says it's time to take off the stupid masks! **

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Mark suggested I reach out
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hello,
National Republicans have made it clear that their top priority in 2022 is defeating my friend Mark Kelly and me, and taking back our seats. They know our majority in the Senate is razor thin and **all eyes are on Arizona and Colorado to see if we can hold these seats.**
Ever since Democrats narrowly flipped the Senate, National Republicans have gone back to the trenches — calling up their big donors and scheming away to retake the majority next year.
Already, dark money groups have launched nasty attacks against Mark and me. All Mitch McConnell has to do is flip a single seat and he’s back in the driver’s seat, blocking progress.
I’ve seen the power of this grassroots team. I know if we dig deep and work together, we can overcome anything thrown our way. But I have to admit, I’m a little worried about the path ahead.
[**If you can, will you split a donation between Mark’s campaign and mine to help us fight off anything the GOP throws our way so we can protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-bennet-may21?refcode=em210520-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=649_6688874_M70Slx&akid=649%2E6688874%2EM70Slx)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-bennet-may21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210520-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=649_6688874_M70Slx&akid=649%2E6688874%2EM70Slx) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-bennet-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210520-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=649_6688874_M70Slx&akid=649%2E6688874%2EM70Slx)

---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-bennet-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210520-1-subs&t=6&refcode2=649_6688874_M70Slx&akid=649%2E6688874%2EM70Slx) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-bennet-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210520-1-subs&t=7&refcode2=649_6688874_M70Slx&akid=649%2E6688874%2EM70Slx)
---|---
Mark and I count ourselves lucky to have so many incredible grassroots supporters. Thanks to folks like you, we narrowly flipped the Senate last year. Now, we must do everything we can to keep it.
Thanks,
Michael

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=8&akid=649%2E6688874%2EM70Slx).

We have to save our democracy

Fair Fight |

| | Friend - I’m going to be direct with you - our democracy is under attack and we need your help today in our efforts to protect it. [**Will you join the fight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29485699/286548907/1257987278?refcode=IE052021POD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWEyMjNmZi05ZWI5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a2lFnK_Jv0fhdVYbnBjBtdc9143Av8U0IUx-vk_EUK8=)

Right now, the GOP is working in lock step on a coordinated effort to make it harder for folks to vote in free and fair elections. With the introduction of more than 400 voter suppression bills in 47 states, the rushed passing of restrictive voting laws in Georgia and Florida, the discredited 2020 election “audit” in Arizona’s Maricopa County done in the name of Trump’s Big Lie and more, **we are not wasting any time.**

Friend, what we do now affects the future of this country.

Fair Fight Action is committed to doing this work, but we can’t do it without your help. [**Will you donate today so that we can fight this attack on our democracy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29485700/286548908/1257987278?refcode=IE052021POD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWEyMjNmZi05ZWI5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a2lFnK_Jv0fhdVYbnBjBtdc9143Av8U0IUx-vk_EUK8=)

For those of you who have given to us recently, we are so grateful for your support. If you want to get involved more or can’t donate today, there are more ways to join this fight for our democracy. Find out how you can help [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29485701/286548909/768938118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWEyMjNmZi05ZWI5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a2lFnK_Jv0fhdVYbnBjBtdc9143Av8U0IUx-vk_EUK8=&emci=8cd6e340-7ab9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=daa223ff-9eb9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=1037277).

Thank you, friend, for standing up for our democracy. As we head into the summer with the pandemic beginning to ease and a new normalcy beginning, hope is truly on the horizon. And there is hope for our democracy, too, if we work together. Let’s get it done.

-Stacey [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29485702/286548910/1257987278?refcode=IE052021POD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYWEyMjNmZi05ZWI5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a2lFnK_Jv0fhdVYbnBjBtdc9143Av8U0IUx-vk_EUK8=) |

As we head into the summer with the pandemic beginning to ease and a new normalcy beginning, hope is truly on the horizon. And there is hope for our democracy, too, if we work together. Let’s get it done. -Stacey = | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: re: Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
I refuse to let Republicans downplay the events of that day. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29487192/286553184/-272948131?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmQ4ZTVlYi1hM2I5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGfSdmXmPmj1Sz32aZwjIFEk6H8e5_UpFukSbkEHxG8=&emci=aea0a8b1-9fb9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=afd8e5eb-a3b9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=252045)
---
On January 6th, Donald Trump incited a mob of insurrectionists to storm the Capitol in a violent attempt to stop the peaceful transfer of power to now President Joe Biden. The insurrectionists beat and tased Capitol Police officers and five people died. Yet just yesterday, Mitch McConnell stood on the Senate floor announcing he will _**outright oppose**_ a bipartisan commission to investigate the horrific events of that day and hold those involved accountable. Folks, I was there on January 6th. The insurrection we experienced was an attack on our Capitol and the many people who serve our country in the halls of Congress — from elected leaders and their staff, to members of the press, to Capitol Police officers. **What happened on January 6th was also an assault on our democracy itself.** I refuse to let the Republican Party downplay that day and abscond responsibility. I will do everything in my power to make sure the Senate moves forward with this independent commission and holds everyone who had a role in inciting the insurrection accountable. Thank you for joining me in standing up for our democracy. — Martin
---
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. subject: Chuck and Nancy sitting in a tree E-R-A-S-I-N-G Trump’s legacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Their one goal is to ERASE everything Trump achieved oevr the past four years.

Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi have everything they have ever wanted: A "Yes Man" in the White House, control of Congress, and a mainstream media that acts like their lap dogs.

_Yet, they still want more._

They're trying to pass statehood for Washington D.C. and permanently add two more blue Senators.

They're trying to add 4 extra liberal Supreme Court Justices to the Supreme court to destroy Trump's Conservative Supreme Court Majority.

[**We must stop them before it is too late. We need patriots like you to step up and sign the petition NOW to end Chuck and Nancy 's games. **](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/stop-chuck-and-nancy/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210520_TY-2.101720_senate-republicans_t1064996-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210520_chuck-and-nancy-sitting-in-a-tree-e-r-a-s-i-n-g-trumps-legacy)

****[STOP CHUCK AND NANCY](https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/stop-chuck-and-nancy/?sc=pem51037m13m&utm_campaign=20210520_TY-2.101720_senate-republicans_t1064996-575&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210520_chuck-and-nancy-sitting-in-a-tree-e-r-a-s-i-n-g-trumps-legacy)****

****

Their one goal is to ERASE everything Trump achieved over the last four years. They don't have the votes to make it happen so they're trying to reset the board to give themselves an advantage.

Don't let Chuck and Nancy get away with their extremism! Enough is enough.

Thank you,

Senate Republicans
