Gov. Reynolds just signed a sweeping charter school bill

[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zx_7S-9CSyaqLM42cFREUye1xZeRIKFCxjjf6NIOpyGBrEPjFWa-GJCFD41FgkHrXOmDaRUlnLf9v0cEm1WqenspHRpTnQU9j-HJ-PLcd6FrI584QQTz6epFcQYTA3mkTlwwCFgPazbbvoLiTmragUvbZButnQci8_4IqIbXmctp-QzdTrboS9cPU2ukxkt_k_ZgDhWPE5Upv5HqrUPZaLAUnSG8acEIe-B6WTsiaUR-749IiOfC2DIzDcfEKt_VZh5a8j2IPb9meLQ1KXxuLWQlGmKOMVD48neNrlj5HAlqg4GSzk3FWQj1qaiqNmUGeKTWw4K7AMM4ZexlXycLi3PU8wS9czt2YChGY6U3vWh2SP5p0hCHRSl642K5F7kuwu3GD5wiNhbRHLSUpj9Bq3VYD3LVn9qyUmWaBPROnlGPL3Ht3RPuTxRt9Ljnbz5Fh6gaiEeBEdj91hncSd70vA==&c=KtETsc2NWae08rILYgC6Bz7xodjuUL6xBzR7k6A_W3lHha2pA7Kztg==&ch=8VOK3Fb1M2Au3W2wdGN7T075PHoD4syWuUJIoj1kTFB32qNN__9vDw==)

Friend,
Our liberties we prize and our rights we will maintain. Those words are inscribed on the Iowa state flag and Governor Reynolds takes them to heart.
Last night, [Gov. Reynolds signed legislation that prohibits K-12 schools from requiring mask mandates! It also prevents local governments from imposing similar mandates on Iowans. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zx_7S-9CSyaqLM42cFREUye1xZeRIKFCxjjf6NIOpyGBrEPjFWa-GEHt5ElrCBVSQ3W96pQsfXHdhwz-NM1pQuI3sIGYTAZaKGrjNAOhuWAmT5I8ZD7HSSz1jDxcuRP3nGr9sWi-2rbq4E8AqijlTLW40EfFZDwBzoZYpYG5cAuuOV5MqYZ-iCgjokJQOOrcMUaE7QE3YaIt6rj2SNN7yanrvtTPD6qpDQOImMvjx4R1X6ai4FbFidhVvrRceE0GGTSkSD9LVQBhbqtpHq1ItQ==&c=KtETsc2NWae08rILYgC6Bz7xodjuUL6xBzR7k6A_W3lHha2pA7Kztg==&ch=8VOK3Fb1M2Au3W2wdGN7T075PHoD4syWuUJIoj1kTFB32qNN__9vDw==)
_**" The state of Iowa is putting parents back in control of their child's education and taking greater steps to protect the rights of all Iowans to make their own healthcare decisions." \-- Gov. Kim Reynolds**_
From day one, Friend, Kim Reynolds has been committed to putting students first, putting parents back in control, and protecting the rights of ALL Iowans.
Now the Left is coming after her. The woke LEFT, the Liberals in the media, and radical Democrats are going to try and win at the ballot box.

body:
Biden has been in the White House for 4 months. Let's take a look at what he's done. | | | |
---
| | | Patriot,

Joe Biden just passed his 4-month mark in the White House. Let's take a look at his record of failure since Democrats took control of the House, Senate, and White House
---
|
* A _**massive border crisis**_. Drugs and criminals coming through at record rates;
* One of the worst jobs reports in almost three decades;
* A gas shortage, prompting 17 states and Washington, D.C. to declare a state of emergency;
* _**Terrorist attacks against our strongest ally in the Middle East;**_
* and _**TRILLIONS**_ of dollars of wasteful spending;
* and the list goes on, and on, and on...

clean_body: Did you see my last email? I want to remind you of my one goal for 2022: Swing State → CONSERVATIVE state full of commonsense values we can all stand Peter, Did you see my last email? I want to remind you of my one goal for 2022: Swing State → CONSERVATIVE state full of commonsense values we can all stand behind. Pennsylvania has a lot on the line. It’s time to bring back commonsense values to our state and stand up to the Far Left for good. Here in the Lehigh Valley, we represent more than progressive ideologies. We know the value of a hardworking American. With your help, I know we can achieve this goal. We have a big fight in front of us–Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and my former opponent, Susan Wild. Peter, they’ll stop at nothing to push their agenda onto all Americans. Your contribution in this fight is of the highest importance. Even the smallest amount helps. It’s fighters like you on our team that will push us over the finish line and flip PA red next year. You know what’s at stake next year.Our freedoms. Our Constitution. Our values. Thanks for your help. Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

name: Team Padilla
subject: Mitch McConnell’s Supreme Court
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends —

I’m sure you may have heard, but the Supreme Court just agreed to take up
the case challenging a Mississippi abortion law that could roll back
abortion rights.

The case could be used as grounds for the conservative Supreme Court to
overturn Roe v. Wade. The implications of this case could be felt for
generations to come.

name: Roger Misso
subject: Become a Battle Buddy - help veterans running for Congress beat the Q Caucus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

At Taking the Hill, we are proud to elect veterans and military family members of integrity to Congress - but we are also not content to simply be just another PAC.

In order to make an outsized impact for our candidates at the ballot box, we are betting big on a deep canvassing strategy to persuade veteran and military family voters in five key U.S. Senate states in 2022. Working with our partners, we will train volunteers and organizers in deep canvassing and leverage them to move persuadable veteran and military family voters. Working together, we can move the needle in competitive House and Senate districts to elect more veterans and establish a majority of integrity in Congress.

[_**But we cannot do this alone.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ucQtd1OlTdw7PTkCGNJ7frTnwDUyz-yUFjtX1OsSQ8=/FfVENY-CJmIUZZ5a0jkLroaGdKDA6cuRYKosOpQVRos=) Veterans like us have relied on ["battle buddies"](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ucQtd1OlTdw7PTkCGNJ7frTnwDUyz-yUFjtX1OsSQ8=/FfVENY-CJmIUZZ5a0jkLroaGdKDA6cuRYKosOpQVRos=) throughout our service - another person or group of people who help navigate the complexities of military service and have our backs no matter what.[ _**Now, we 're asking you to become our Battle Buddy for 2022!**_ Become a recurring donor to help us do the work we need to do to make history in the midterm elections.](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ucQtd1OlTdw7PTkCGNJ7frTnwDUyz-yUFjtX1OsSQ8=/FfVENY-CJmIUZZ5a0jkLroaGdKDA6cuRYKosOpQVRos=) Here's how your support will help us:

For [_**$21/month ,**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ucQtd1OlTdw7PTkCGNJ7frTnwDUyz-yUFjtX1OsSQ8=/FfVENY-CJmIUZZ5a0jkLroaGdKDA6cuRYKosOpQVRos=) you can help us put on one 4-hour canvassing session to reach more than 100 voters.
For [_**$50/month ,**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ucQtd1OlTdw7PTkCGNJ7frTnwDUyz-yUFjtX1OsSQ8=/FfVENY-CJmIUZZ5a0jkLroaGdKDA6cuRYKosOpQVRos=) you can help us run a full-day canvass to reach more than 250 voters.
For [_**$100/month ,**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ucQtd1OlTdw7PTkCGNJ7frTnwDUyz-yUFjtX1OsSQ8=/FfVENY-CJmIUZZ5a0jkLroaGdKDA6cuRYKosOpQVRos=) you can help us hire a part-time staffer to organize our efforts in one House district and reach more than 2,000 voters.
For [_**$250/month ,**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ucQtd1OlTdw7PTkCGNJ7frTnwDUyz-yUFjtX1OsSQ8=/FfVENY-CJmIUZZ5a0jkLroaGdKDA6cuRYKosOpQVRos=) you can help us hire a full-time staffer for one House district and reach more than 4,000.
For [_**$400/month ,**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ucQtd1OlTdw7PTkCGNJ7frTnwDUyz-yUFjtX1OsSQ8=/FfVENY-CJmIUZZ5a0jkLroaGdKDA6cuRYKosOpQVRos=) you can help us hire a staffer to run our efforts for [_**one entire US SENATE SEAT and reach more than 40,000 voters!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ucQtd1OlTdw7PTkCGNJ7frTnwDUyz-yUFjtX1OsSQ8=/FfVENY-CJmIUZZ5a0jkLroaGdKDA6cuRYKosOpQVRos=)

AND, [_**if you give $200 or more per month**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ucQtd1OlTdw7PTkCGNJ7frTnwDUyz-yUFjtX1OsSQ8=/FfVENY-CJmIUZZ5a0jkLroaGdKDA6cuRYKosOpQVRos=) , you'll get into all of our monthly events this cycle for FREE, with guests like Mark Kelly, Raphael Warnock, Elaine Luria, Tim Ryan, and more government, sports, and Olympic leaders coming up! (Those who give $21/month or more will also get access to a special, reduced ticket price for our upcoming events this year!)

Thanks for having our backs while we do the hard, necessary work to beat the odds and WIN the midterm elections. [_**Welcome to the team, battle buddies!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ucQtd1OlTdw7PTkCGNJ7frTnwDUyz-yUFjtX1OsSQ8=/FfVENY-CJmIUZZ5a0jkLroaGdKDA6cuRYKosOpQVRos=)

Yours in service,
Roger

Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ucQtd1OlTdw7PTkCGNJ7frTnwDUyz-yUFjtX1OsSQ8=/qosRJ9YbVtVDBi_09FCsoocqY9DoxabXDZ_XCbupX_s=)
To make a contribution, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ucQtd1OlTdw7PTkCGNJ7frTnwDUyz-yUFjtX1OsSQ8=/XyIsQEuOo94sm72ciGTMugcN1TBjPk03uCF2HkqWpR8= "https://act.myngp.com/el/8ucQtd1OlTdw7PTkCGNJ7frTnwDUyz-yUFjtX1OsSQ8=/XyIsQEuOo94sm72ciGTMugcN1TBjPk03uCF2HkqWpR8=").
Checks may be mailed to:
Taking the Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol, PA 19007

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---
Taking The Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/8ucQtd1OlTdw7PTkCGNJ7frTnwDUyz-yUFjtX1OsSQ8=/tKb1TUzAX1dHGgX4Q9ypWqKtyHJWHyaZCF7XCPcKjuM=).

We can’t trust him to vote in the best interests of our democracy.
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29489400/286563643/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTZiZTMxMy1hYmI5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ktAXafmGNe5iZcDSYaKH76uRNL4RSXob5CuTaSRTnZI=&emci=806be313-abb9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&emdi=816be313-abb9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&ceid=11385749)

So much for bipartisanship, Peter.

Before the House voted on the January 6th Commission last night, the Republican member who helped write the bipartisan bill to form it _literally begged_ his colleagues to stand up for our democracy and support the Commission, no matter their party.
_“I urge all of you in this body, all of you on both sides, not just my side or not just your side, all of us, to set aside politics, just this once. Just this once, I beg you, and pass this bill.”_
\- Rep. John Katko (R-NY)
**Well, that didn’t seem to get through to Mike Garcia. Despite promising to support the Commission, when push came to shove he voted against it. Mike put his allegiance to Trump above his country.** [DONATE TO FLIP CA-25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29489401/286563644/-2110369639?refcode=em21_210520_commission-s2bb&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTZiZTMxMy1hYmI5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ktAXafmGNe5iZcDSYaKH76uRNL4RSXob5CuTaSRTnZI=) Although Republicans got almost everything they wanted in the legislation, Mike -- along with 174 other GOP members -- voted _against_ this bipartisan effort to investigate the insurrection on January 6th.

An insurrection that saw an angry mob shouting that they wanted to _hang_ the Republican vice president. An insurrection that put members of the U.S. Congress in danger. An insurrection that left Capitol police officers dead and countless others physically and emotionally scarred.

Every time he’s had an opportunity to put country over party and do the right thing, Mike has _refused_ to protect our democracy. He voted to overturn electoral college results -- even after an angry mob stormed the Capitol. He voted to keep Donald Trump in office, despite his incitement of that mob. And now, he’s doing his best to keep Trump happy and sweep January 6th under the rug for good.

**Peter, Mike Garcia doesn’t deserve the office he holds. He’s failed his district, his country, and the oath he swore to defend the Constitution. He has to go.

[RUSH a donation right now to send him packing in 2022 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29489402/286563645/-2110369639?refcode=em21_210520_commission-s2bb&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTZiZTMxMy1hYmI5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ktAXafmGNe5iZcDSYaKH76uRNL4RSXob5CuTaSRTnZI=)** ---
| | Ron Johnson went on Fox News last night and claimed this about the January 6th insurrection:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29489926/286565245/1538089409?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210520_1_1&refcode2=a3d6ab28-adb9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57ba3ed&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2Q2YWIyOC1hZGI5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=baIi1NEVelMxFzYqeAkapa77W-Vi3G-4KdwmaoxHTkU=)
“By and large it was a peaceful protest”
_— Ron Johnson (Actually)_
Remember, this is the same violent insurrection that resulted in 140+ Capitol Police Officers injured and 5 deaths.

Peter,

Last election, [**I came within 5 points of toppling one of the Democrat establishment’s strongest pillars in Washington,**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=4f3b6b4e2df1470ea5f2ec8db0366ead&_e=tc8qnmCgQAr14xnBSzSsAvheDZz6BJY8aLBrTl_BQF5V8uTHrAStEGh6h7Meabv_RqRA6jBJ6xukco5PiVs-xXFPjI6SwFGNcifzxGksQumQ9LpKXefHFCNQE8zyIhr4-pe-nG4rI61RVQIfTbxqEoDM7cWOT07lA-DuQd5qLDS4dtA_otmRHW0UsoAfMmoWDM1pitEg7zvTIVRGIaPX6lKV3HlpQNXg2jxvKEhJ2cu525z9thIHXLMbO31v3uT_7YppyEs57akoCvYY8PwY44PGfTTWaQKXxbSELj2He4HQKwgHhtQiYxB6jHsLA1VPQYV_2Mph5wf9eT3fOxoIEEiqCAR4P7JU0rbZ4RexlUdyNa9_A_I6yqhKIsw0Iky4FvB_ItjEjrVHyGxVgXOE1q3rRBYxcanLBV6IFxyf2oT7odHXjbDj7EpdX9aU4KKMjEY-eGgjuOJy4rReB1R7XQ%3D%3D) Nancy Pelosi’s closest ally, Peter DeFazio.

While we weren’t victorious, we laid the groundwork to flip this seat and take back control of the House in next year’s midterm election and secured my voice as a leading, strong conservative for young Americans.

I have been working tirelessly to expose the Democrats’ corruption and hypocrisy, but it’s nearly a full-time job, Peter - _which means I barely have time to fundraise for my 2022 campaign._

The NRCC and leading Republicans are behind me, but I need the support of every grassroots conservative across the nation to win in 2022. | | | Friend, it's Chuck Grassley.

My good friend, Ashley Hinson, is bringing Iowa common sense back to Congress.

In the years I have served the people of Iowa I have worked alongside many members of Congress. **Few work as hard or care about their constituents as much as Ashley does. **

She is exactly the type of person the people of Iowa's 1st district deserve representing them in Congress.

With Ashley in Congress, we can continue pushing common-sense policies that benefit all Iowans.

But Ashley needs your help.

Nancy Pelosi and her far-left allies are ready to flood Iowa with millions of dollars to defeat her. If Ashley is unable to hold on, then our chances to take back the House will fall to almost zero.

**We must keep Ashley in Congress, Friend. **

name: Jennifer Carroll Foy
subject: all eyes on us tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | |
I’m preparing for another debate tonight and I can tell you the pressure is on. Now that Republicans have selected their nominee, all eyes are on Terry McAuliffe and me. It’s a contest to see who has the upward momentum and the ability to turnout not just likely Democratic voters, but also expanding the base to take on a deep-pocketed Republican in the general election.

Peter, I know with the right resources I can win. The polling shows that we have a path to victory and the only thing standing in our way is the funding to execute our winning strategy.

**[Like I said, this is a contest of momentum. I want to go out there confident that we have the resources in the door to keep fighting strong. Can I count on you to chip in now?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yItEt7UQpuYeCalSemnTXDFku3bS54evJefeYhzuGSuVFJWIOqnR43DUmd1Rbsz2RTcN3o5E0N6c_mNvSAbKoRlCQGZvodWkpHYYCalMloK7DwoFaoNyphbvfL2aFaGGEnomcph2rvfCGt9f-8c-mt7xpvtkpYDFxU37eVwiFRiMAQgDO3ZD0TS59s7C6dWUeMwn9nfMSwl-BSAKEGfzLsRhWSe7f1rRuEaQeZDZWpjqG4gpGpDkj8bayskACcQr_ZJ8BMDkr4Fxe8EYY5IJ2iVmn2esuNHFyO3fS6MbUKmiM3pBSMcLYveVmwQL_LJgD5oYASc3gaMjR44kbn4qFd/3c2/Cyi1ak3KSOiNHTydh1misA/h0/3HnfJpkbGWVRNkzIE65ZpnvQ5r2tI1TuemjAB14SrvI)**

I hope I make you proud tonight. I’ll circle back with more soon!

Jennifer

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. clean_body: | | | I’m preparing for another debate tonight and I can tell you the pressure is on. Now that Republicans have selected their nominee, all eyes are on Terry McAuliffe and me. It’s a contest to see who has the upward momentum and the ability to turnout not just likely Democratic voters, but also expanding the base to take on a deep-pocketed Republican in the general election. Peter, I know with the right resources I can win. The polling shows that we have a path to victory and the only thing standing in our way is the funding to execute our winning strategy. I hope I make you proud tonight. I’ll circle back with more soon! Jennifer Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities. She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor. Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. ** | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor PO Box 2306 Arlington, VA 22202 United States | | Sent via . clean_body: Are you a Trump Republican, Peter? | Peter, 👍 We nominated President Trump for re-election. 👍 We delivered our Electoral College votes in 2020. 👍 We are hosting President Trump on June 5th. When he walks off the stage after his big speech on June 5, I’m going to hand President Trump a list of every Grassroots Republican who’s still standing by his side. | | | | | | I know President Trump, Peter. He cares about the details. And when I speak with him on June 5th, I know he’s going to ask me about who stepped up to support him. I definitely don’t want to have to tell him that you stood on the sidelines when it mattered most. | Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

Hey friend,

As the finance director, I’m constantly looking at the numbers to see where our race stands.

**We just got an update that made me nervous.**

The Cook Political Report released their report on redistricting in congressional districts. **Tom is ranked as one of the most vulnerable incumbents for redistricting.**

This race just became even more important. With our district being so crucial, we can’t take anything for granted. | | Derek, I just left the virtual debate stage and I’ll tell you the same thing I told MSNBC’s Chuck Todd:

**_Republicans will stop at nothing to elect Trump-endorsed, self-funding extremist Glenn Youngkin as Virginia’s next Governor. We have to stop them._**

Glenn Youngkin and his $75 million war-chest pose an existential threat to all the progress we’ve made here in Virginia in the past 8 years. Elections analysts everywhere are saying that Republicans have a real chance at winning the governor’s office this November -- and it’s clear that it’s their number one priority. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: It’s a cover up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
The insurrectionists who attacked the U.S. Capitol on January 6th were organized and ready to do harm — fueled by Donald Trump's incendiary lies about the election.
**We can’t just move on from the deadly and destructive attack on the Capitol** — that’s why I voted for a Commission to fully investigate the attack. _But the vast majority of Republicans in the U.S. House voted against that Commission this week._ They don’t want the public to know all of the details of the attack and they want to protect their own party members who fueled the attack — including Trump, Ted Cruz, and Josh Hawley.
**[I will continue to speak out about the need to expose the truth about January 6, investigate the GOP’s involvement, and hold everyone involved accountable — including Trump. Fuel my push to hold those responsible for the insurrection fully accountable with a donation today — we can only get this done if we push back on GOP disinformation.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2623?refcode=em20210520-306&t=19&akid=306%2E420207%2EGvdBhz)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2623?refcode=em20210520-306&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=306%2E420207%2EGvdBhz)**
Our democracy was on the line on January 6. Trump, Hawley, Cruz, and other Republican lawmakers used their large platforms to incite people with falsehoods and propaganda.
If we don’t investigate what happened and hold people accountable for their actions, the deadly events of January 6 can happen again. Especially as the GOP grows more extreme and emboldened to flout the rule of law. I need you with me on this, Peter.
**[You can fuel my continued, steadfast effort to secure accountability for the January 6 Capitol attack with a contribution today.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2623?refcode=em20210520-306&t=21&akid=306%2E420207%2EGvdBhz)**
This is not just about what happened to members of Congress, it’s about what happened to custodial staff, aides, and everyone who feared for their lives that day. And it’s about our entire country. Our lives were at risk but so was our democracy.
Thank you for continuing this urgent work with me,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210520-306-footer&t=22&refcode2=306_420207_GvdBhz&akid=306%2E420207%2EGvdBhz)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

This is your last chance to cast your vote. Do you think that California is on the right track under Gavin Newsom? Cast your vote here before the dea Peter, We just concluded our survey, and the results are clear. Our families are worried that Claifornia is off on the wrong track under Governor Gavin Newsom’s failed leadership. It’s easy to see why people are concerned. With unemployment and homelessness spiraling out of control, our state infrastructure crumbling and violent crime on the rise, Gavin Newsom isn’t doing a thing to ease our anxieties. Keeping our kids away from their classrooms and forcing mom-and-pop businesses to stay closed isn’t helping either. I’m running for governor to get California back on the right track. I will put California families first, reopen our economy and get our kids back into school. **[I need your help to do so though, Peter... | I grew up on a farm and know just how devastating the Green New Deal would be for Iowa’s farmers and agriculture industry. Luckily, I’m not the only one fighting every day to stop this radical plan in its tracks. Randy Feenstra knows that our farmers and the families who depend on agriculture for a paycheck are the backbone of our economy. I know for a fact that **Randy is using his position on the Agriculture Committee to stop the potentially irreparable damage that AOC and Nancy Pelosi would cause to Iowa.** [**Help me and Randy Feenstra stop the Green New Deal in its tracks >>>**](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=gAbOqugG6RJ%2BllKwZHsanCcKLgr793zCl2P7lflJIY07yaBnuEoouJJ8S5mXzsHFPUxcQF8V6B6KlbyyUOOT1wTmuRBrSVXL39Ly2cemsC2iLroYdrbdhoCrPXkXf%2BIb&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FYOQOG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DqH2rj_YW3AbVVOSc-maXT0Whnik_xuQKR38Y5pov8Q7JXH7oHp5G7X5Iu5OvOw9p0&I=20210520210931.0000001f8926%40mail6-35-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjE4NDYyMDg5OTU7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE1ODc0NjM3MTs%3D&V=3&S=yvI6w1fdjeE8cp8ng3ADT9UwC4hpBGXg1W4zfqgZSo0) Together, Randy and I are fighting to protect Iowa families and jobs. subject: petition to stop the Democrat powergrab

We all know there’s a huge problem with political elites who work for Washington instead of working for the people who elected them. name: Tim Ryan
subject: I won’t stand for Republican BS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
| | Look, I honestly don’t know what else would have to happen for Republican officials to start living in reality. Less than 6 months ago, a sitting president incited a riot at the US Capitol where rioters assaulted police officers. _**And we still can’t get bipartisanship to address what happened?**_ I’m running for Ohio’s open Senate seat to put an end to these games and get real results for the American people. [_**If you’re with me, will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Susie Lee's so we expand our slim Democratic majority and get it done?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29497976/286608330/-902012409?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210520_FR_TIMRYAN_A0_NA_U1_X1_M2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWJhNTdmYy1kMWI5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYSxeOjy-ZuvpQUd9DWfncXAb5bXRfFW0wRrZCEEohw=) | | | [Chip in >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29497977/286608331/-902012409?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_210520_FR_TIMRYAN_A0_NA_U1_X1_M2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWJhNTdmYy1kMWI5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CYSxeOjy-ZuvpQUd9DWfncXAb5bXRfFW0wRrZCEEohw=)

Republican leaders just came out against the bipartisan commission investigating the facts of the Capitol riot.
Kevin McCarthy and Mitch McConnell have both bent over backwards to rewrite history and pretend January 6 was a normal day.
**That’s an insult to every police officer in this country.** _Especially to the**140** officers who were injured defending our Capitol._
We have to invest in our workers. We have to compete with China. We have to beat climate change.
And we can’t do any of that with a major political party that refuses to accept reality.

# BEHIND THE SCENES: Town Hall With Governor Ron DeSantis
Check out all the footage from our golf cart race, our conversation over shuffle board, and playing catch with Governor DeSantis as well as a behind the scenes look at the day leading up to the town hall. You’ll get a behind the scenes look at all the planning and production of putting a town hall event on TV. Don’t miss it...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a7b2b3c536&e=f6564bbe3b)
| [WATCH HERE](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8d3e464dbb&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
## Israel remains under attack...
Last night on _Spicer & Co,_ we received an update from former defense minister and leader of the Yamina Party, Naftali Bennet in Israel on the ongoing unrest in the region. The media has gotten so much of this story wrong, Naftali joined us to set the record straight.

name: Erica Smith
subject: [Add your Name] Pass the PRO Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
We must raise our collective voices to build worker power and strengthen our unions right now.
#
I’m proud to stand in solidarity with the thousands of McDonald’s workers, in North Carolina and across the country, who courageously went on strike yesterday to demand a $15 minimum wage.
**This is not a political matter. This is a MORAL matter.** The minimum wage needs to be a living wage, and a living wage is worth fighting for.
We must stand up, do what’s right, and fight to secure *at least* a $15 minimum wage. But, we can’t stop there. **By passing the PRO (Protecting the Right to Organize) Act, we can empower workers to fight back against corporate abuse and bargain for better wages, benefits, and protections.**
**[The House has passed this bold, transformative bill to support working people. Now, it’s time for the Senate to take action. Will you add your name to urge the Senate to pass the PRO Act?](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/email_ms_ES_20210520_EA_PROact/?source=em20210520-106&t=1&akid=106%2E3698%2ElWJJfK)**
**[Pass the PRO Act »](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/email_ms_ES_20210520_EA_PROact/?source=em20210520-106&t=2&akid=106%2E3698%2ElWJJfK)**
I believe in the dignity of work, and I refuse to accept a reality where corporations have too much wealth and power while working people struggle to get by.
That’s why when I’m in the Senate, I will work to strengthen overtime pay protections, ensure paid family leave is guaranteed, protect unions, and raise the minimum wage to at least $15 an hour. But workers are hurting right now and can’t afford to wait.
[**We must raise our collective voices to build worker power and strengthen our unions RIGHT NOW. Add your name to sign on as a supporter of the PRO Act.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/email_ms_ES_20210520_EA_PROact/?source=em20210520-106&t=3&akid=106%2E3698%2ElWJJfK)
Thank you for taking action,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210520-106-footer&t=4&refcode2=106_3698_lWJJfK&akid=106%2E3698%2ElWJJfK)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

body:
Dr. Fauci was wrong on nearly every major decision made during the pandemic. In your opinion, should he be fired? VOTE NOW &NDASH; We're looking for 50,000 conservatives to answer this question: Does Trump still lead the Republican Party? Don't want to receive our emails? ---

Peter,

In America, we have the Constitution. And **(...this may be news to Dr. Anthony Fauci...)** , the Constitution is not suspended during a pandemic.

In America, we have a thing called freedom of speech **(... although this may be news to Facebook ...)** , which the Founding Fathers made sure to put before all other Constitutional rights to signify _just_ how important it was to them – and to every generation since – that Americans have the freedom to speak their mind without fear of reprisal from the government.

**But if you’re like me, you recognize that our fundamental rights and liberties are currently under attack from the DC swamp and liberals in positions of power working in Big Tech.**

**[Today, I’m asking you to take 30 seconds out of your day and let my team and I know whether or not you feel as though your liberties have been under attack from Dems, Big Tech, and unaccountable government bureaucrats over the past year.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=73625496e19546e4aa6b78cde07f520d&_e=xKw6BKqK3hVNO8KVTM_RNgY08-veZ9tXRttqDY8mBLr3RZCcE8N5craawaHE_ij0hNp4g9jFSvFJDB-s2DZikfkCKNyGitcEBl0dyhI7cxexp42fPJKvgjf7rhIXfMe8h1E23lu-Ps5SEa8rx9OvR-k0CgJ0CgkbOqxslDdbM4OtkvdvlB64zruh9Cqhdasis29zsTOvQHuU8AudWiM8dvlhvZsR8c00upVk_lRUdEsKUdFzecDBxzAyzeFQ4GCh9bbUfYl05rp6JpZQXPTwwuDA4Di1LwHHRxvsZFnbIMJdk-_t7DPkiVEfLDuXRjTk2jrVuRyFKOW2JdRimF9WAz4Lkjh17Vt5hLu8l1y2qzeCArb3CRbkm_gAUZz1DsW0t6fxO2RmllXQ-y9NkUqnmVnAKblHYohHKL_WlwwzIG4aw2Yc4M5PGXvPleDsGjVcPPyB7UhbXcErJbr5ezbwdrkYIQC8qrExrKaNidwJtim1iocN16KUBcJZCQgBOG7j)**

[ ➲ TAKE THE SURVEY NOW](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=73625496e19546e4aa6b78cde07f520d&_e=xKw6BKqK3hVNO8KVTM_RNgY08-veZ9tXRttqDY8mBLr3RZCcE8N5craawaHE_ij0hNp4g9jFSvFJDB-s2DZikfkCKNyGitcEBl0dyhI7cxexp42fPJKvgjf7rhIXfMe8h1E23lu-Ps5SEa8rx9OvR-k0CgJ0CgkbOqxslDdbM4OtkvdvlB64zruh9Cqhdasis29zsTOvQHuU8AudWiM8dvlhvZsR8c00upVk_lRUdEsKUdFzecDBxzAyzeFQ4GCh9bbUfYl05rp6JpZQXPTwwgZ27ay7jryTnqEMYTPoFNkWE9XPsc-O9Lmvl2r2ptcnEd3OSLr498SMPVJmX2YCjMsD-4Ku9iyEfNAM1-Bx3GsPDoV0jDbMcohATKRFeTYYAO61NDreTG21edD14fPec3HTe59vBLg_f9bC-UkDTCqmg-9FwIfhakxnmtsOMXTST2QVvbsY3pyj_bdxTCEy3FCdzmoz4rkwHHAfixWMGjzdrjrWMSY18DBteK1DwAnG)
It’s important to remember that we’re in the middle of a battle for the right to live as we decide. If Facebook can ban President Trump, then they can ban every conservative voice on their platform.

As conservatives, it’s important stand up for these rights every time they come under attack; we must even defend our progressive friends in the Democrat Party because these liberties extend to them as well – even if they won’t stand up and fight for them.

_Need an example?_

In a sign of the callous disregard liberals have for the Constitution, look no further than the response to questions recently posed to Dr. Fauci. He was asked if he believed the liberty of **Americans had been put at risk over the course of the past year.** To little surprise, he at first tried to dodge the question, but later gave a deeply troubling answer.

**The troubling answer Dr. Fauci finally gave was:_“I don’t look at this as a liberty thing... I look at this as a public health thing.”_ **

Oh, really?

* Schools closed
* Churches closed
* Millions of lost jobs
* Trump banned from social media
* and now considering vaccine passports?

Two weeks to flatten the curve has now become a year of rolling lockdowns. That is a “health thing” with immeasurable impacts on the lives of Americans.

The DC Swamp wants us to just go along with their disastrous plan...and they want to cancel and destroy anyone who opposes them.

I want to know what you think: **[Do unelected Big Tech executives and career government bureaucrats have too much say in how Americans go about our daily lives? clean_body: Dr. Fauci was wrong on nearly every major decision made during the pandemic. In your opinion, should he be fired? VOTE NOW &NDASH; We're looking for 50,000 conservatives to answer this question: Does Trump still lead the Republican Party? Don't want to receive our emails? | Peter, In America, we have the Constitution. And (...this may be news to Dr. Anthony Fauci...) , the Constitution is not suspended during a pandemic. In America, we have a thing called freedom of speech (... although this may be news to Facebook ...) , which the Founding Fathers made sure to put before all other Constitutional rights to signify just how important it was to them – and to every generation since – that Americans have the freedom to speak their mind without fear of reprisal from the government. But if you’re like me, you recognize that our fundamental rights and liberties are currently under attack from the DC swamp and liberals in positions of power working in Big Tech. It’s important to remember that we’re in the middle of a battle for the right to live as we decide. If Facebook can ban President Trump, then they can ban every conservative voice on their platform. As conservatives, it’s important stand up for these rights every time they come under attack; we must even defend our progressive friends in the Democrat Party because these liberties extend to them as well – even if they won’t stand up and fight for them. Need an example? In a sign of the callous disregard liberals have for the Constitution, look no further than the response to questions recently posed to Dr. Fauci. He was asked if he believed the liberty of Americans had been put at risk over the course of the past year. To little surprise, he at first tried to dodge the question, but later gave a deeply troubling answer. The troubling answer Dr. Fauci finally gave was:“I don’t look at this as a liberty thing... I look at this as a public health thing.” Oh, really? Schools closed Churches closed Millions of lost jobs Trump banned from social media and now considering vaccine passports? Two weeks to flatten the curve has now become a year of rolling lockdowns. That is a “health thing” with immeasurable impacts on the lives of Americans. The DC Swamp wants us to just go along with their disastrous plan...and they want to cancel and destroy anyone who opposes them. I want to know what you think: ** FOR LIBERTY AND FREEDOM, Jim Jordan | | As the ranking Republican member on the House of Representatives Judiciary Committee, Jordan is leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. ---|--- | ---|--- | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

clean_body: we need Democrats in Cresco to defend the President | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Mitch McConnell has gone . After spending years enabling the worst of Donald Trump’s hateful agenda, he just promised to BLOCK anything and everything President Biden tries to get done: | | | | | | | This poll closes in exactly ONE HOUR, so please submit your response as soon as possible to ensure it is counted! ## It’s inexcusable that Mitch McConnell is already committed to OBSTRUCTING President Biden’s agenda. But it’s not especially surprising: Remember -- McConnell did EVERYTHING in his power to stop President Obama during the final years of his term, We can’t kick McConnell out of the Senate, but we can send him and his obstructionist allies in the far-right a message they won’t forget. | | | | | Thanks for taking a few seconds to respond, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference:** | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via .
